verses.lines:
Gw'oli mutukuvu, Ayinza byonna!
Buli ku nkya tunaakutenderezanga;
Oli Mutukuvu! W'akisa wa maanyi!
Katond(a) afuga ebintu byonna

Gw'oli Mutukuvu, Bakutendereza,
Bamalayika bo bakuvunnamira;
(E)nkumi n'obukumi, Bakusinza wonna,
Gwe (e)yaliwo era olibaawo.

Gw'oli Mutukuvu, Newaakubadde,
Nga tetukulaba n'amaaso g'obuntu;
Gw'oli Mutukuvu, Tewali mulala,
Atuukiridde mu maanyi gonna

Ka tukusuute, (O) mulokozi waffe,
Gwe~ yafa kaakano wagenda mu ggulu.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Aleruya tukusuuta, Aleruya Yesu,
Aleruya tukusuuta, Tuwonye nate.

Ka tukusuute (O)mwoyo Mutukuvu
Gw'e~yatulaga Omulokozi waffe.

Ka tukusuute gw'Omwana gw'endiga.
Gwe~ yatukuza ebibi byaffe byonna.

Ka tukusuute Katonda (o) w'ekisa,
Gwe~ yatununula n'otutuusa gyoli.

Tuwonye nate, tujjuz(e) okwagala,
(O)mu~liro gwakenga mu myoyo gyaffe.

Aweebw(e) ekitiibwa Katonda waffe; Yayagal(a) ensi n'awaay(o) Omwana we,
Yafuuka saddaaka y'ekibi kyaffe; Naggulaw(o) oluggi ffe tuyingire.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Tumutendereze, Ensi ewulire; Tuyimbe tuyimbe, Ensi esanyuke;
Mujj(e) eri Kitaffe mu Mwana Yesu; Aweebw(e) ekitiibwa yatununula.

Twanunulibwa twagulwa musaayi; Kisuubizo eri buli akkiriza;
Omubi lukulwe amukkiriza, Asonyiyibwa ebibi bye byonna.

Atuyigirizz(a) ebikulu bingi, N'essanyu lingi lyatuwa mu Yesu;
Oyo Mutukuvu mugulumivu, Kiriba kisuffu nga tumulabye.

title: Ka Tumusinze Mukama Waffe
first_line: Katumusinze Mukama waffe, Katuyimbe ku kwaga~l(a) okungi.

verses.lines:
Katumusinze Mukama waffe, Katuyimbe ku kwaga~l(a) okungi.
Oyo yekka kye kiddukiro kyaffe, Ekitiibwa kyonna kimuwe~toloola.

Tuyimbe ku kisa kye ekingi, (E)byambalo bye gwe (o)musa~na gw'ensi;
Okubwatuka kwe kutiisa byonna, Amakubo ge gali ne~ mu mpewo.

Obuyinza bwe era n'entiisa, Birabikira wonna~ ku bire;
Eggulu n'eraddu n'omuyag(a) era, Byonna baddu be abamwu~wereza.

Wansi w'eggulu (O)mugulumivu, Wateekebwa dda enku~luze yo;
Ye nsi gye watonda n'ogyetolooza, Ennyanja zonna nga ensa~lo zaayo.

Ani ayinza okunnyumiza, Ebyo, (O)mugabi waffe,~ by'ogaba?
Eby'ekisa kyo, by'ebitwewunyisa: Katonda, Mulokoz(i), era~ Kabaka!

Mmwe amawanga~ (a)g'oku~ nsi,
Mujje tuvunname fenna!
Awali e~nte~b(e) e~nkulu,
Eya Mukama Katonda.

Nnannyini buyi~nza bwo~nna,
Yatuggya mu nfuufu fenna;
Ffe bwe twawa~ba~ ng'e~ndiga,
Yayanguw(a) okutunoonya.

Tunajjuza (e)mi~ryango~ gye,
Ennyimba ez'amatendo;
Tumwebaze~ n'e~ddo~boozi,
Nga tumutendereza nnyo.

(A)mateeka ge ga~ mire~mbe
(O)kwagala kwe kuwangula;
(A)mazima ge~ te~ga~kyuka,
Gabaaw(o) emirembe gyonna.

Mukama Ggwe kifo kyaffe
Eky'okutuulamu,
Mu mirembe n'emirembe
Era Lwazi lwaffe.

(O)kuv(a) edda abatukuvu
Baakwesiganga Ggwe;
(O)mukono gwo gwabamala
Gunaatumala ffe.

Ensi nga tennatondebwa
Ebintu nga mpaawo,
Edda n'edda gw'oba bumu
Katond(a) atavaawo.

Emyak(a) olukumi gy'oli
Lwe lunaku lumu;
Gikulukuta ng(a) amazzi
Agayita (a)mangu.

N'ebintu byonn(a) eby'omu nsi
Biyita bwe bityo,
Leero tuba nabyo, naye
Jjo nga biweddewo.

Mukama Ggwe kifo kyaffe
Eky'okutulamu,
Mu mirembe n'emirembe
Era Lwazi lwaffe.

O~kukaaba kwange owulire, Jjangu, (O)muloko~zi;
O~mwoyo gwange gukwetaaga nnyo; Jjangu, (O)muloko~zi.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nakyama okuva mu kkubo lyo,
Mbulubutira mu ddungu;~
Ntwa~la onzize mu kisibo kyo,
Jjangu, (O)muloko~zi.

Si~rina buddukiro bulala, Jjangu, (O)muloko~zi;
A~maaso go ge gamp(a) obulamu, Jjangu, (O)muloko~zi.

E~kkubo limbuze, nkooye nnyo, Jjangu, (O)muloko~zi;
E~r(a) essuubi lyange lizirika, Jjangu, (O)muloko~zi.

To~gobanga mmeme emenyese, Jjangu, (O)muloko~zi;
O~nokkiriz(a) okusaba kwange, Jjangu, (O)muloko~zi.

Ggwe eyannunula nebaz(a) ekisa kyo,
Mu Ggwe mwe mul(i) ensibuko y'emikisa gyonna,
Mu Ggwe mwe mul(i) ensibuko y'emikisa gyo~nna.

Nze ndi kitonde kyo Ggwe (o)bulamu bwange,
Katonda wange, nsanidde okukusuutanga,
Katonda wange, nsanidde okukusuuta~nga.

Kale nnaakuwa ki anti byonna bibyo?
Mpayo omutima gwange, saddaka y'omwavu,
Mpayo omutima gwange, saddaka y'omwa~vu.

Nsaba ekisa kyo, kinjijuz(e) amaanyi,
Okwagala kwange kwonna kubeerenga kukwo,
Okwagala kwange kwonna kubeerenga ku~kwo.

title: Jjangu Yesu Obe Mu Nze
first_line: Jjangu Yesu obe mu nze, Lungamy(a) omwoyo gwange,

verses.lines:
Jjangu Yesu obe mu nze, Lungamy(a) omwoyo gwange,
Guyimbeng(a) ebiro byonna, Okukutendereza.
Njigi~riza okusi~nza, Ndage~ng(a) obulungi bwo,
Essuubi ly'amaka gaffe nga linjijuz(a) essanyu.

Nyimus(a) eddoboozi lyange, Nga nsab(a) okuyamba kwo,
Olw'okwagala kw(o) okungi, Olintuusa mu ggulu;
Yesu~ (O)mununuzi wa~nge, Ggwe (e)ya~mponya okufa,
N'oggyaw(o) ebyonono byange, Bwewawangul(a) okufa.

Yesu wang(e) okwagala kwo, Bulijjo kweyongere,
Olw'ekisa kyo ekingi, Kanywererenga ku ggwe.
Era~ nnem(e) okukuva~ko, Mbeere~ mu kwagala kwo,
Twala obulamu bwange, Butegeker(e) eggulu.

title: Bonna Basuute Mukama
first_line: Bonna basuute Mu~ka~ma, Erinnya lya Yesu (e)ddungi:

verses.lines:
Bonna basuute Mu~ka~ma, Erinnya lya Yesu (e)ddungi:
Ye Kabaka w'eki~tii~bwa, Erinnya lya Yesu (e)ddungi.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Lyebazibwenga, lyebazibwenga, Erinnya lya Yesu (e)ddungi:
Lyebazibwenga, lyebazibwenga, Erinnya lya Yesu (e)ddungi.

Yesu (O)mununuzi~ ye~kka, Erinnya lya Yesu (e)ddungi:
Ye lye ssanyu ly'omwo~noo~nyi Erinnya lya Yesu (e)ddungi.

Yameny(a) amaanyi (a)g'e~ki~bi, Erinnya lya Yesu (e)ddungi:
(O)musaayi gwe gutu~ku~za, Erinnya lya Yesu (e)ddungi.

Twebaza Ggw(e) omuva byonna,
Ensi zonna zikusuute,
Ab'omu ggulu basuute,
Kitaffe, (O)mwana, ne Mwoyo;
A-mii-na.

title: Emirimu Tugirese
first_line: E~mirimu tugirese, Ne~ tujja mu mpya zo;~

verses.lines:
E~mirimu tugirese, Ne~ tujja mu mpya zo;~
Tube n'essanyu okujja,~ Er(i) Omulokozi.

O~musumba Omukulu, La~g(a) ekitiibwa kyo;~
Tuvunname mu kkanisa,~ Ffenna nga tusaba.

(E)bi~re ebikubikkako, Bi~ggyewo Mukama;~
Longoos(a) emitima gyaffe~, Tufun(e) obubaka.

O~mutima omugonvu, Gu~tuwe Mukama,~
Twakir(e) okuva mu ggulu,~ Tukule mu Mwoyo.

Yesu wasuubiza ffe abantu bo; Bwe tubeer(a) awamu, oba kumpi nnyo:
Kigambo~ kakano tukikkiriza, Beera naffe wano, otusanyuse.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Yesu, jja~ngu muffe, Nga tuli~ wano;
(O)mukisa~ gwo gu~be--, Mu kuku'ngana.

Bulijjo Mukama obadde naffe, Yongera kubeera awamu wano;
Ggwe totu~vangako tukwetaaga nnyo, Ayi Yesu jjangu, tukulabeko.

Yesu otuyambe ffe nga tuyimba, (E)nnyimba zaffe zonna zikusanyuse;
(E)ssuubi lya~ffe mu ggwe lyeyongerenga, Naffe tweyonger(e) okukufaanana.

Ka ntambule naawe~ Yesu,
Nga Enoka bwe ya~kola;
Ggwe onkwate ku mu~kono,
Era oyo~gere nange.
Nebwemba siraba~ kkubo,
Yesu~ ka ntambule naawe.

title: Yesu Alifuga Wonna
first_line: Yesu ali~fuga~ wonna, Wonn(a) omusana~ we gwaka:

verses.lines:
Yesu ali~fuga~ wonna, Wonn(a) omusana~ we gwaka:
Obwakabaka bwe~ bu~fuge, (O)kutuusa e~nnaku~ zonna.

Abantu b'e~nnimi~ zonna, Batenderez(e) e~kisa kye;
Abaana banabuu~li~ranga, Obulungi~ bw'eri~nnya lye.

Omukisa~ gwe we~guli, (A)basibe bafu~n(e) eddembe;
Abakooye bana~wu~mmula, Abetaaga~ ne ba~kkuta.

Buli muntu~ yimi~rira, Otende nnyo Ka~baka wo;
Bamalayika ka~ ba~yimbe, Ensi edde~mu, "A~miina"

Nkwetaaga Ayi Mukama, Nz(e) omunafu, (o)mwonoonyi;
Onkwatenga ku mukono, Ompenga ku maanyi go.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
(O)lwa leero, buli (e)ssaawa, Nkwetaaga ayi Mukama!
(O)lwa leero, buli (e)ssaawa, Beera nange tondeka.

Nyambaza obuwombefu, Nze ajjudd(e) amalala;
Ntegeeza bwe nd(i) omunafu, Nsembeza kumpi gy'oli.

Mu Ggwe mbeera n'emirembe, Bwembeera nzekka nnemwa:
Nkuma mu lugendo lwange, Ggwe (e)ssuubi lyange lyokka.

Byonn(a) ebinanjijiranga, Mu ssanyu ne mu nnaku;
Ku Ggwe kwe nanywereranga, Ggwe kiwummulo kyange.

Si nze, naye, Kristo alabikenga,
Si nze, naye, Kristo awulirwe;
Si nze, yekka, Agulumizibwenga,
Si nze, Kristo, Afug(e) obulamu.

Si nze, naye, Kristo abagumyenga,
Yekka, asangule amaziga;
Si nze, naye, Asitule (o)mugugu,
Si nze, Kristo, Asirise (o)kutya.

Kristo yekka, So si (e)bigambo byange,
Kristo yekka, So si amalala
Kristo yekka, Si eddoboozi lyange,
Kristo yekka, Si kweyagala nze.

Si nze, naye, Kristo agaba byonna,
Si nze, Kristo, Ampa obulamu;
Kristo yekka, Omwoyo n'omubiri,
Kristo yekka, Obugagga bwange.

(O)mulokozi, ng'Omusu~mba~; Beera naffe bulijjo,
(O)tuliisize mu ddundi~ro~, Lye watukolera ffe;
Omusumba omwagalwa, Watugula ffe babo,
Omusumba omwagalwa, Watugula ffe babo.

Abaana bo otuya~mbe~, Tulung'amye mu kkubo,
Ekisibo kyo tukuu~me~, Bwe tubula tunoonye;
Omusumba omwagalwa, Otuwulire mangu,
Omusumba omwagalwa, Otuwulire mangu.

Ajja gy'oli bwe waga~mba~, Tomugobera bweru,
Olw'ekisa kyo tuwo~nye~, Otunaazeek(o) ebibi;
Omusumba omwagalwa, Tukyuse tudde gyoli,
Omusumba omwagalwa, Tukyuse tudde gyoli.

title: Ku Musalaba Yanfiirira
first_line: Ku musalaba yanfirira, Kwe yampeera obulokozi,

verses.lines:
Ku musalaba yanfirira, Kwe yampeera obulokozi,
Omusayi gwe, gwe gunnaaza, Yebazibwenga.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nebaza Yesu,~~ Yebazibwenga;~~
Ku musalaba yanfirira, Yebazibwenga.

Newuunya nnyo bwe yandokola, Ye Mukama abeera mu nze;
N'ansembeza ku musalaba, Yebazibwenga.

Gwe ow'amaanyi olokola, Nsanyuka olw'okuba mu Ggwe;
Era mu Ggwe mwe ndokokera, Webazibwenga!

Jjangu eri Yes(u) ow'ekisa, Waayo omutima gwo leero;
Naaba mu mazzi gwe owone, Yebazibwenga.

title: Mukama Lwe Lwazi Lwaffe
first_line: Mukama lwe lwazi lwaffe, Eri oyo gyetweyuna;

verses.lines:
Mukama lwe lwazi lwaffe, Eri oyo gyetweyuna;
Ye atuwonya mu kabi, Ye kye kiddukiro kyaffe.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ggwe Olwa~zi olw'amaanyi,
Obwekwe~ko bw'abanaku,
Omusaa~le w'abayise,
Ggwe (e)kiddukiro mu nnaku.

Ye atuwonya mu byonna, Eri oyo gyetweyuna;
Tetutya ntiisa ya mubi, Ye kye kiddukiro kyaffe.

Ennaku bwe zitujjira, Eri oyo gyetweyuna;
Mwe muli eddembe lyaffe, Ye kye kiddukiro kyaffe.

Ggw(e) Olwazi lw'abantu bonna, Eri Ggwe gyetuddukira;
Otuyambenga bulijjo, Beera kiddukiro kyaffe.

title: Yesu Tuzze Eri Ggwe
first_line: Yesu tuzz(e) eri Ggwe, Tewali mulala,

verses.lines:
Yesu tuzz(e) eri Ggwe, Tewali mulala,
Tweyuna Ggwe wekka, Nga tusaba.
Tuli mu nzikiza, Yesu nga toliiwo,
Tuwe ku ssanyu lyo, Ayi Yesu.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Yesu tuzz(e) eri ggwe,
Tukkirize,
Tewali mulala,
Tuwulire.

Tuwony(e) abalabe, N'amalala g'ensi,
Tuwummule mu Ggwe, Otukuume.
Tutiisibwa mu nsi, Tuwe obuzira;
Twetaag(a) amaanyi go, Gawanguza.

Tuwe ku kisa kyo, Tufuule baana bo,
Otuwony(e) ebibi, Beera naffe.
Otunyweze mu Ggwe, Tuwangule ensi,
Tukwat(e) omukono, Tube naawe.

Tompitako (O)mulokozi, Nkwegayirira;
Nga oyita abalala, Nange ompite.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ayi Ye~su, Nsab(a) ompulire,
Nga bw'oyita abalala, Nange ompite.

Ku ntebe yo ey'ekisa, Mpebw(e) emirembe,
Nfukamidde wooli Yesu, Nsab(a) onsonyiwe.

Nkwesiga Ggwe Yesu wekka, Ndag(a) amaaso go;
Ompony(e) endwadde z'omwoyo, Yes(u) ondokole.

Ggwe nsulo y'essanyu lyaffe, Osinga byonna;
Tewali mulala ku nsi, Oba mu ggulu.

Yesu gw'oli ssanyu lyaffe,
Gw'oli~ mu~sa~na gw'a~bantu;
Twalek(a) eby'omu nsi muno~,
Ne tusanyu~kira~ mu~ Ggwe.

(A)mazima go tegakyuka,
Olo~ko~l(a) a~bakwe~siga;
Abakunoonya besiima,~
Abakula~ba ba~kku~ta.

Ggwe (O)mugaati gw'obulamu,
Twetta~ni~r(a) o~kulii~sibwa;
Tunywa mu Ggw(e)
Ensul(o) ennamu,~
Otuwony(a) e~nnyonta~ ya~ffe.

Wonna tukyukira gy'oli,
Gw'oli~ ki~wu~mmulo~ kyaffe
Bw'otusiima, tusanyuka,~
Bw'obeera na~ffe tu~la~ma.

Jjang(u) otubeesebeese ffe,
Tule~m(e) o~ku~bulu~buta
(E)kizikiza (e)ky'ensi goba,~
Otwakiz(e) o~musa~na~ gwo.

title: Erinnya Lya Yesu Ddungi
first_line: Erinnya lya Yesu ddungi, Eri akkiriza!

verses.lines:
Erinnya lya Yesu ddungi, Eri akkiriza!
Lisangul(a) amaziga ge, Limalamu (o)kutya

Litereza n'omwoyo gwe, Linyig(a) ebiwundu;
Ye mmere y'omuyal(a) era, Liwummuz(a) akooye.

Erinny(a) egganzi, lwe Lwazi, Bwe bwekweko bwange,
Lye ggwanik(a) eritaggwamu, (E)kisa (e)kirokola.

Yesu Omusumba wange, Ggwe Kabaka wange;
Ggwe bulamu bwange bwonna, Kkiriz(a) ettendo lyo.

Ndi munafu mu mutima, N'ebyo byendowooza;
Bwenkulaba Ggwe nga bwo'li, Nkutendereza nnyo.

Atikkirw(e) engule,
Omwana gwendiga;
Muwulir(e) amatendo~ ge,
Agatenkanika,
Fuba mwoyo gwange,
N'amaanyi go gonna;
Oyatule Kabaka wo,
Eyakufiirira.

Atikkirw(e) engule,
Eyakomererwa;
Enkovu z'emisumaa~li,
Zonna zirabika,
Teri malayika
Agumiikiriza
Okulaba enkovu ze
Ez'emisumaali

Atikkirw(e) engule;
Kabak(a) ow'eddembe!
Entalo zikome ku~ nsi,
Tumutendereze.
Alyoke afuge,
Emirembe gyonna,
Ebimuli bitimbibwe
Mu nsi yaffe empya!

Atikkirw(e) engule,
Emirembe gyonna;
Eyatonda obwengu~la,
Oyo atalemwa,
Asinzibwe wonna,
Eyatufiirira;
Asinzibwe, asinzibwe,
Emirembe gyonna.

title: Katonda Tusiibule
first_line: Katonda~ tu~siibule~ nno, Kkiriz(a) e~tte~ndo lyaffe;

verses.lines:
Ayi Mukama otuwulire
Nga tukyali wano tukwebaza;
Nga tukyali mu kusinza kuno,
Tulindiridde, otisiibule

Tuwe emirembe nga tuddayo,
Tube mu Ggwe okutuusa (e)kiro
Tuwonye mu kukemebwa kwonna,
Nga bwe tukowoodde erinnya lyo.

Tuw(e) essanyu mu bulamu bwaffe,
Era (o)tuyambe mu nnaku zonna;
(E)misana n'ekiro tube babo,
Tuwummulire mu bukuumi bwo.

Ku nsi kuno otuw(e) emirembe
Beer(a) essanyu lyaffe mu bizibu;
Bw'olituyita ku nkomerero,
(O)tutwale gy'oli, mu mirembe gyo.

title: Twalanga Erinnya lya Yesu
first_line: Twalang(a) erinnya lya Yesu Ggwe omwana (o)w'ennaku,

verses.lines:
Twalang(a) erinnya lya Yesu Ggwe omwana (o)w'ennaku,
Lireet(a) essanyu n'eddembe, Litwale buli wodda.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nga ddungi, ddungi nnyo,
Ssuubi n'essanyu lyaffe:
Nga ddungi, ddungi nnyo,
Ssuubi n'essanyu lyaffe.

Twalang(a) erinnya lya Yesu, Ng'engabo ekukuuma,
(E)bikemo bwe bikulumba, Kowoolang(a) erinnya lye.

Lya kitiibwa erinnya lye, Linsanyusa mu mwoyo,
Ng(a) atukutte mu ngalo ze, Ffe nga tumuyimbira.

Tusinz(a) erinnya lya Yesu, Nga tuvunnama w'ali:
Alitutikir(a) engule, (O)lugendo nga luwedde.

Gwe Yesu Omu~lokozi, nkwagala,
Ebyonoono bya~nge byonna mbikyaye;
Ggwe wekka omwa~galwa wa~nge Yesu,~
Mukwano gwange~ Yesu, nkwa~gala nnyo.

Kuba ggwe wasoo~ka, nange nkwagala,
Wangula n'omu~saayi gwo bwe wafa;
Ku lw'engule (e)y'a~maggwa ka~ nkwagale,~
Mukwano gwange~ Yesu, nkwa~gala nnyo.

Mu ssanyu ne mu~ nnaku, nze nkwagala,
Nasuutanga e~rinnya lyo bulijjo;
(O)kufa nga kuse~mbedde ndyo~gera nti:~
Mukwano gwange~ Yesu nkwa~gala nnyo.

Bwe ndiba nga ntu~se eyo mu ggulu,
Ndikusinza no~kwagala okungi;
N'okuyimba ndi~yimba n'e~ssanyu nti:~
Mukwano gwange~ Yesu nkwa~gala nnyo.

title: Yesu Ggwe Eyanjagala
first_line: Yesu Ggwe wanjagala Ka nzirukire gy'oli;

verses.lines:
Yesu Ggwe wanjagala Ka nzirukire gy'oli;
Amayengo g'ennaku Nga gankubira ddala.
Nkweeka mu mikono gyo, Abannumba bamaanyi,
Sirina magezi nze, Kkiriz(a) omwoyo gwange.

Tewali kiddukiro Wabula mu mwoyo gwo;
Tondekanga! Nteetera, Naatera kugwa bugwi
Essanyu lyange lyonna Ndiggya mu kubeerwa kwo,
Nsensenz(e) omutwe gwange Wansi w'emikono gyo.

Ggwe wekka ggwe netaaga, Tewali akwenkana:
Agudd(e) omuyimuse, Vumula azirise.
Omulwadd(e) omuwonye, Zibula eyazibiddwa,
Nze njijjudde ekibi, Gw'oli butuukirivu.

Yaza gyend(i) ekisa kyo, Sangul(a) ebibi byange,
Nin(a) ennyont(a), ondetere (A)mazzi agampony(a) ennyo.
Gwe nsulo y'obulamu, Kansene omwo mwokka
(O)mwoyo gwange gujjule (A)mazzi ag'obulamu.

Ka nnyimbe ku kwagala
Kwa Yesu (e)yanjagala:
Eyava mu ggulu lye,
Okufa ku lwange nze!

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ka nnyimb(e) okwa~gala kwe,
Nnaakute~nde~rezanga
Eyatti~bwa ku lwange,
Nneebaza eki~sa kye.

Yesu ye yanjagala
Nze nga si~nnamwagala,
Nga sinna~mukowoola
Yeyasook(a) okunoonya

Okwaga~la kwo Yesu,
Tekute~geerekeka:
Nz(e) atali~na kalungi,
Lwaki wanjagala nze?

Yesu ye~raga gyendi,
Siyinza kumugaana
Okwaga~la kwe gyendi
Nange kumpaliriza.

Nsanyukira~ nny(o) o~kuyimba Eby'obulokozi;
Ku Kabaka~ wa~nge Yesu, Eyannunula nze

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
E~yannunula nze, E~yannunula nze
Oyo lye ssanyu lyange; E~yannunula nze,
Nsanyuka nnyo olw'erinnya lye.

Nnina Yesu~ a~mpa byonna, Eyannunula nze;
Nsanyuk(a) o~ku~muwereza Eyannunula nze.

Ye Mujulirw(a) o~mwesigwa Eyannunula nze;
Leero sikya~li~ko kye ntya Yannunula Oyo.

Antegeke~dde~ amaka Eyannunula nze;
Mwe nnaabeera~nga~ bulijjo Eyannunula nze.

title: Onsembeze Ayi Mukama
first_line: Onsembeze ayi Mukama, Naye sirina konna ke nkuwa;

verses.lines:
Onsembeze ayi Mukama, Naye sirina konna ke nkuwa;
Onkumire mu mikono gyo, Akabi konna gyekatatuuka. x2

Onsembeze ayi Mukama, Naye sirina konna ke nkuwa;
Ndeese ebibi byange byonna, Gwe onongoose n'omusaayi gwo. x2

Onsembeze mbe wuwo wekka, Ebibi byange byonna mbiwaayo;
N'okwesiima kwonn(a) okwekibi, Netaaga Yesu eyanfiirira. x2

Onsembereze ddala gyoli, Ontuuse mu kitiibwa kyo kiri;
Eky'emirembe n'emirembe, Mbeerenga wamu ne Yesu wange. x2

title: Ontegeeze ku bya Yesu
first_line: Ontegeeze ku bya Yesu, Mbinywereze ku mwoyo;

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ontegeeze ku bya Yesu, Mbinywereze ku mwoyo;
Ebyo bising(a) obulungi, Byonn(a) eby'omu nsi muno.

Mbulir(a) eby'omusalaba, Bwe bamukomerera;
Ne bamuziika mu ntaana, N'azukira mu bafu.
Okwagala kwe (o)kunene, Tunakwenkanya na ki?
Kale ka nnebaze Yesu, Mukama ya~nnunula.~

title: Nsanyuka Okuyimba
first_line: Nsanyuka okuyimba nti, "Yesu Yannunul(a) olw'okufa kwe",

verses.lines:
Nsanyuka okuyimba nti, "Yesu Yannunul(a) olw'okufa kwe",
Mu kwagala kwe yannunula, Ndi wuw(e) emirembe gyonna.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Yannunula, Yannunul(a) olw'okufa kwe,
Yannu~nula,~ --- Ndibeera naye bulijjo.

Yannunula nsanyuka mu Ye, Essanyu lyange lingi nnyo,
Nga ndaba nti omusana gwe, Gunabanga munda yange.

Buli kaseera konna konna, Ndowooza ku Mulokozi,
Era olw'essanyu n'ennyimba, Ku kwagala kwe okungi.

Lunaku lwe bwe lulituuka, Ndiraba Kabaka wange,
Ankuuma mu lugendo lwange, Ansanyus(a) omwoyo gwange.

Manyi ng'antegekedd(e) engule, Mu nnyumba y(e) ey'omu ggulu,
Bw'alimala okunnongoosa Ndibeera naye bulijjo.

title: Nalyoka Ne Nkusenga
first_line: Nalyoka ne nkusenga Ggwe, Omulokozi Katonda;

verses.lines:
Nalyoka ne nkusenga Ggwe, Omulokozi Katonda;
Kye nvudde nsanyuka nnyini, Ne njatula bwe nsanyuse.

verses.label: Chorus

verses.lines:
Namusenga n'atangoba; Nze ndi wuwe naye wange;
Yampita ne nditegeera, (E)ddoboozi lye nga lya Yesu.

Edda nasagasagana, Kakano nteredde ku Ye;
Sikyamusenguk(a) alina, Mukama y'alina byonna.

Nalayira nti ndi wuwe, Kankyogerenga bulijjo,
Era bw'olijja Mukama, Ndisanyuk(a) okub(a) owuwo.

title: Okwagala Kwo Ggwe
first_line: (O)kwagala kwo Ggwe Mu~kama, Kusing(a) essanyu lyo~nna;

verses.lines:
Tussize Mwoyo wo~ leero, Mmalaw(o) emitawa~na
Tuyambe fenna tu~beere Abasikir(a) ebi~ngi.
Gwe Alufa ne O~mega Otuwony(e) okwonoo~na!
Tunyweze mu kukki~riza, Otutuuse mu dde~mbe.

Ayi Ggwe ayinza~ byonna, Ekisa kyo kitu~we;
Jjangu Siir(o) obecre~ mu ffe Era totuvaanga~ko
Tunayimbang(a) ette~ndo lyo Tunakuweereza~nga
Nga bwe bakola mu~ ggulu Tunakusuutanga~ Ggwe.

Tutonde fenna o~buggya Nga tetuliiko bba~la;
Era (o)bulokozi~ bwonna (O)kutuukirira kwo~nna,
Okuyita mu ki~tiibwa Tweyongere mu maa~so,
Okutuusa lwe tu~liba N'engule mu maaso~ go.

title: Ka Nnyimbe Ku Buyinza
first_line: Ka Nnyimbe ku buyinza bwo, Katonda wa byonna;

verses.lines:
Ka Nnyimbe ku buyinza bwo, Katonda wa byonna;
Ennyanja zakolebwa Ggwe, Awamu n'ebbanga.
Nebaza obuyinza bwo, Obwas(a) omusana,~
Ggwe olagira omwezi, N'emmunyeenye zonna.

Nebaza obulungi bwo, Ggwe atuwa emmere;
Essanyu n'ebintu byonna, Era birungi nnyo,
Emirimu gyo mikulu Mu bantu bo bonna,~
Bwendowooza ensi eno, Era n'eggulu lyo.

Buli kintu kyonna ku nsi, Kirag(a) amaanyi go;
Ebbanga ne kibuyaga Ggwe obiragira,
Obulungi buva gyoli, Byonna Ggw(e) obikuuma,~
Era buli kintu kyonna, Kiri mu maaso go.

Emikisa gyo Mukama, Mpulidde ogigaba
Abalala bagifuna, Nange ka ginjiikeko.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ndi wano, ndi wano,
Nange ka ginjiikeko.

Yesu Mukama tonsubya, Laba bwe ndi omubi,
Naye omponye mu byonna, Ka mpebwe ku kisa kyo.

Weewawo nkusobezza nnyo, Era nkunakuwaza,
Nga ngoberera ebyensi, Naye nsab(a) onsonyiwe.

Tonvako ayi Katonda, Ggw(e) otuwa okumanya,
Ndag(a) ekisa kya Katonda, Ompe emirembe gyo.

title: Jangu Ggwe Omwoyo
first_line: Jangu Ggw(e) Omwoyo wa Yesu, Otuule mu nze leero,

verses.lines:
Jangu Ggw(e) Omwoyo wa Yesu, Otuule mu nze leero,
Ontukuze nze omubi, Jangu mu nz(e) olwa leero.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Beera mu nze leero, Ofug(e) omwoyo gwange,
Onjijuze amaanyi go, Jangu ayi Mukama.

Ggw(e) ojjuza omwoyo gwange, Siyinza kukyolesa,
Naye netaaga nnyo ojje, Jangu mu nz(e) olwa leero.

Ayi Yesu ndi munafu, Naye nvunnamye w'oli
Tuma Omwoyo wo ajje, Anjijjuz(e) obulamu

Onnongoose, ondokole, Onnaaze omutima,
Ggwe aggyako bonn(a) ebibi Jangu mu nz(e) olwa leero.

Omwoyo Omutu~kuvu, Omulungamya~ waffe
Tukwate ku mu~kono Fenna abata~mbuze,
Abalina e~nnaku Tuwulirize bulungi,
Eddobooz(i) eddu~ngi nti: "Mujje, nze maba~tuusa".

Omubeezi (o)mwe~sigwa, Otuyambe bu~lijjo,
Totuleka mu~ ntiisa Ey'enzikiza~ y'ensi.
(O)tusanyuse mu~ nnaku Bwe tunawuliranga,
Eddobooz(i) eddu~ngi nti: "Mujje, nze naba~tuusa".

(O)lugendo bwe lu~liggwa, Nga tulindiri~ra Ggwe,
Eby'ensi bwe bi~riggwa, Ng'olin(a) amannya~ gaffe,
(O)tuyise mu ma~yengo, (O)lw'omusayi gwa Yesu,
Eddobooz(i) eddu~ngi nti: "Mujje, nze naba~tuusa".

title: Omwoyo Owa Katonda
first_line: Omwoyo owa Katonda, Wulir(a) abaana bo;

verses.lines:
Omwoyo owa Katonda, Wulir(a) abaana bo;
Ofuule emyoyo gyaffe, Ekifo mw'obeera.

Beera mu ffe maanyi mangi, Tube bawanguzi;
Tukuz(a) emitima gyaffe, Nga saddak(a) ennungi.

Twakiz(a) omusana tuwe, Amazima gonna;
Yoles(a) ekkubo efunda, Lye tuba tukwata.

Tonyesa ku ff(e) omukisa, Mu ssaaw(a) entukuvu;
Buli omu anafuye, Aweebwe amaanyi.

Jangu nga empewo leero, Pentekote yaffe;
Jangu obulokozi bwo, Bubune ku ns(i) eno.

Nsanyukira obulamu bwange,
Bwe mbeera awamu ne Yesu;
Omukisa gyendi n'emirembe,
Bwe mbeera awamu ne Yesu.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nywera, Nywera, (nyweranga, nywera) x2
Owangule mu linnya lye;
Nywera, Nywera, (nyweranga, nywera) x2
Ng'oli awamu ne Mukama.

(E)kkubo lye lireeta (e)ssanyu lingi,
Kubanga atukulembera.
Omusana gwe gwaka bulijjo,
Kubanga atukulembera.

Kintu ki ekiyinz(a) okuntiisa,
Bwe mbeera awamu ne Yesu?
Mbeera n'eddembe lingi bulijjo,
Bwe mbeera awamu ne Yesu.

title: Tewali Wa Mukwano
first_line: Tewali wa mukwano nga Yesu, Tewali, tewali;

verses.lines:
Tewali wa mukwano nga Yesu, Tewali, tewali;
Atuwonya endwadde z'omwoyo, Tewali, tewali.

verses.label: Chorus

verses.lines:
Tewali mutukuvu nga Yesu, Tewali mulala;
So tewali muwombefu nga Ye, Ye yekka, Mukama.

Bulijjo abeeera kumpi naffe, Kumpi nnyo, Kumpi nnyo;
Ne mu kizikiza atwakira, Abeera kumpi nnyo.

Yesu ayinza okutuleka? (O)mwesigwa, tayinza!
Agoba omubi ajja gy'ali? (O)kugoba, tayinza!

Kirabo ki ekyenkana Yesu, Tewali na kimu!
Alitutuusa gy'ali mu ggulu? Agambye, wewaawo.

title: Enjuba Eyaka Ku Ntikko
first_line: (E)njuba eyaka ku ntikko, Ku nsozi ne ku nnyanja;

verses.lines:
(E)njuba eyaka ku ntikko, Ku nsozi ne ku nnyanja;
Omusana gulengerwa, Eri ku lubalama.
Naye omusana mungi, Gwaka mu mwoyo gwange,
Kuba Yesu ali mu nze, Aleeta enjuba ye.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Gwe omusana omulungi, Ogwaka munda yange;
Yesu Ggwe omusanyusa, Ggwe enjuba yange nze.

Mu nfuufu nze mwe ndireka, Ennaku zange zonna,
Nga onyambazizz(a) essanyu, N'ettendo lyo eringi,
Mu maka agekitiibwa, Gewannongooseza nze,
Ndigenda nga njijudde nnyo, Ekitiibwa kyo munda.

title: Bwe Ntuula Awali Ebigere
first_line: Bwe ntul(a) awal(i) ebigere, Bya Yesu ansanyusa;

verses.lines:
Bwe ntul(a) awal(i) ebigere, Bya Yesu ansanyusa;
Njagala okuba naye, Mpulir(a) ebigambo bye
Bwe mbeera awamu naye, Ndowoz(a) ebikolwa bye
Okwagala kw(e) okunene, Okwansembeza w'ali.

Awali ebigere bye, Kye kifo ky'omwonoonyi
We nzisa ebibi byange, Era we mpummulira.
Awali ebigere bye, Nfuk(a) okusaba kwange
Era olw'ekisa kye Ye, N'ampa okuwummula.

Bali~na (o)~mu~kisa
Aba~sibwa (a)~wamu,
Okwe~gatta~ ne Mu~kama,~
Ly'essa~nyu ly'e~ggulu!

Mu maa~so g'e~ntebe,
Tusa~bir(a) a~baffe,
(A)mazi~ga, n'o~kutya~ kwaffe,~
Byonna~ tule~k(a) awo.

Bali~na (o)mu~kisa,
Abo~ (a)bakki~riza,
Oku~suubi~za kwa~ Yesu, ~
Abo~ (a)bamwe~siga.

Bwe twa~wuka~na ffe,
Tulu~mwa mu~ mwoyo;
Naye~ tusuu~bira~ nate,~
Oku~laba~gana.

title: Nkwagala Ggwe Ayi Yesu
first_line: Nkwagala Ggwe ayi Yesu, Okusinga byonna!

verses.lines:
Nkwagala Ggwe ayi Yesu, Okusinga byonna!
Kubanga wampa eddembe, Erising(a) ery'e~nsi.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nga tekutegerekeka, (kwagala),
(O)kwagala kw'olina;
Era nga tegutendeka (musaayi),
(O)musaayi gwo Yesu! (musaa~yi gwo!)

Manyi ng'oli kumpi nange, Okusinga ensi;
Ebigambo byo biwonya, Obulumi mu~nda.

Wateeka essanyu mu nze, Ka nsanyukenga nnyo;
Singa tewa'ngumya (o)mwoyo, Nandiraby(e) enna~ku.

Ayi Mulokozi wange, Eyo ndibeera ntya!
Obanga essanyu lyompa, Linsanyusa ku~ nsi?

Nzuddeyo ow'Omukwano, Yasook(a) okunjagala,
N'ampalula mu~ kisa kye, Ekyakkirizisa nze,
Leero ndi muddu we naye, Abaddu be ba ddembe;
Nze ndi wuwe, na~ye wange, (E)mirembe n'emirembe.

Katonda abeerenga naawe, Akuwenga omukisa,
Akukuume mu kwagala, Okutuusa Yesu lw'alijja.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Weraba, ~-- Weraba,~ Otambule mi~re~mbe;
Weraba,~ -- Weraba,~-- Mulokozi abeere naawe.

Katonda abeerenga naawe, Akukwate mu ngalo ze,
Akuw(e) emmere y'omwoyo, Akukuume mu kwagala kwe.

Katonda abeerenga naawe, Entiisa bw'erikujjira,
Akwetoolooze ekisa, Abeerenga naawe bulijjo.

Katonda abeerenga naawe, Era akuwe eddembe,
Akuyise mu mayengo, Akutuuse mu kisulo kyo.

title: Ggwe Yesu Oli Wange
first_line: Ggwe Yesu oli wange ddala, Ggwe wekka Ggwe ekitiibwa kyange;

verses.lines:
Ggwe Yesu oli wange ddala, Ggwe wekka Ggwe ekitiibwa kyange;
Ndi musika w'obulokozi, Nagulibwa na musaayi gwo.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nze nnaakuyimbiranga Yesu, Nga nkutendereza bulijjo;
Nze nnaakuyimbiranga Yesu, Nga nkutendereza bulijjo.

Nze ndi wuwo era nsanyuka, Nga nnenger(a) essanyu lyo lyonna;
Bamalayika bo nga bajja, Nga bandaga okwagala kwo.

Mu Ggwe nnina ekiwummulo, Njijudd(e) essanyu lyo eringi,
Nyimusibwa mu mwoyo gwange, Ntadde essuubi lyonna mu Ggwe.

Mpa Ekitabo Ekitukuv(u) ennyo, Kindag(a) ekkubo nze akooye nnyo,
Tewali kirobera kwaka kwakyo, Kirag(a) Omulokozi nga bwali.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mpa Ekitabo Ekitukuv(u) ennyo,
Ndyoke ndagirirwe ekkubo lyo,
Nnung'ame mu mateeka agalimu
(O)kutuusa ku lunaku lw'olidda.

Bwe mba mu nnaku, ye ttabaaza yange, Ekibi bwe kindeter(a) okutya,
Mukama ondage Ekigambo kyo, Olw'okwaka kwakyo nkulabenga.

Ommulisizenga ekkubo lyange, Ompe okudduka ensi eno,
Ng'onjakiz(a) ettabaza y'omu ggulu, Endag(e) ekkubo ery'emirembe.

Omp(e) ettabaza ey'Obulokozi, Enteketeeke olw'okudda kwo,
Ndab(e) omusana gwo ogw'omu ggulu, Mu kitiibwa kyo ekitaggwawo.

title: Nsanyuka Okwogera
first_line: Nsanyuka okwoge~ra Ku by'eri mu~ ggulu,

verses.lines:
Nsanyuka okwoge~ra Ku by'eri mu~ ggulu,
Ku kitiibwa kya Yesu E~ra bw'atwa~gala;
Njagal(a) okubyogera Kuba mbikaka~sa,
Bimpummuza omwoyo Okusinga byonna.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nsanyuk(a) okubinyumya, Nnaabyogerangak(o) ebyo;
Ebigamb(o) e~bikulu, (E)by'ekisa kya Yesu.

Binsanyusa nnyo nnyi~ni, Okubyoge~rako,
Buli lwe mbyogerako Nze~ bimpoomera nnyo.
Nsanyuk(a) okubinyumya Bangi tebama~nyi,
(O)bulokozi bwa Yesu Mu Byawandiikibwa.

Njagal(a) okubyoge~ra Er(i) ababi~manyi,
Ababbyetaaga ennyo O~kubiwu~lira,
Bwendituuka mu ggulu, Oluyimba lwa~nge
Biriba bigamb(o) ebyo, Bye njagala ennyo

title: Ontegeeze Ebya Yesu
first_line: Ontegeeze ebya Yesu, Ondage okwagala kwe,

verses.lines:
Ontegeeze ebya Yesu, Ondage okwagala kwe,
Yesu mulokozi wange, Yanjagala n'anfiirira.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Yogera ku Yesu, Yogera ku Yesu
Yogera ku kwagala kwe,
Yes(u) Omulokozi wange.

Ontegeeze ebya Yesu, Ondage ye byayagala,
Era onjigirizenga, Okukola obulungi.

Ontegeeze ebya Yesu, Era leka nze mpulire,
Okusuubiza kwe kwonna, Kw'alina mu Kitabo kye.

Ontegeeze ebya Yesu, Kaakano ali ludda wa?
Obwakabaka bwe bujje, (O)mulangira w'emirembe.

Kakano tusiga, ensigo za Yesu,
Twokebw(a) omusana, tuba mu mpewo;
Tulind(a) ekiseera eky'amakungula
Tuliba n'essanyu, nga tukungula.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nga tuyingiza, ebikungulwa,
Tuliba n'essanyu nga tuyingiza;
Nga tuyingiza, ebikungulwa,
Tuliba n'essanyu nga tuyingiza.

Siga mu musana, Siga ne mu nkuba,
Awatali kutya nnaku na ntiisa;
Ekiseera kijja, mu makungula ge,
Tuliba n'essanyu, nga tukungula.

Mu kiseera kino, tukola na nnaku,
Emirundi mingi, tufiirwa bingi;
(E)nnaku bwe ziriggwa, alitusanyusa,
Tuliba n'essanyu, nga tukungula.

title: Wonya Bonna
first_line: Wonya bonna ab(o) abali mu kibi,

verses.lines:
Wonya bonna ab(o) abali mu kibi,
Bakwakule okuva mu kufa;
Saasira abantu abalumw(a) ennyo,
Balag(e) obulokozi bwa Yesu.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Leet(a) abantu bonna, Abali mu kufa,
Bawone olw'ekisa kya Yesu.

Newankubadde nga bo bamunyooma,
Ye yetaaga okubalokola.
Abayita bonna n'okwagala kwe,
Bwe bakkiriza anaasonyiwa.

Ab(o) abayonoonebwa omulabe,
Mukama ajja kubazza buggya;
Olw'okwagala kwe, era n'ekisa,
Anawoonya buli (e)kyonoonese.

Fubanga ku lw'abo bonn(a) abaabula,
Mukama anakuwa amaanyi.
Bakomyewo bangi mu kkubo (e)ddungi;
Bateegez(e) eyafa ku lw'ababi.

Tewewolereza, (O)mulimu munene,
Weewereyo ddala, Yes(u) akukozese
Ayita n'ekisa, Jjangu ompereze,
Weewereyo ddala, Olisanyusibwa

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Kkiriza, (leero) Tewewolereza;
Kkiriza, (leero) Weewereyo ddala
Bw'onneworereza,
Onoddibwamu nti,
'Kale Tonjagala,
Ogobeddwa wendi.'

Teweworereza, Yesu akuyita,
Oludde ng'ogaana, Kakano kkiriza
(E)nnimiro zengedde, (A)bakozi batono;
Kkiriza n'essanyu Okumuwereza.

Teweworereza, Okulwa kya kabi,
Ng'otenguwa Yesu, Oy(o) eyakwagala;
Mu kiseera kino, ng(a) ekisa wekiri,
Ng'akuwolereza, Jjang(u) osonyiyibwe.

title: Nze Ndowooza ku Nsi
first_line: Nze ndowooza ku nsi Eyo ennungi ennyo

verses.lines:
Nze ndowooza ku nsi Eyo ennungi ennyo
Yesu gy'alitutwala fenna,
Olw'ekisa kye Oyo eyatwagala
Ndiba n'emmunyenye mu ngule!

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mu ngule yange mulibaamu (e)mmunyeenye
Obudde obwo bwe bulikya?
Nga ntuuse mu bifo bir(i) eby'omu ggulu, ---
Ndiba n'emmunyenye mu ngule?

Mu maanyi ga Yesu ka nkole, ka nsabe,
Ka nfube okubuuliranga;
Emmunyenye ezo ziriba nnyingi nnyo,
Mu ssanyu lir(i) eritakoma.

Ndisanyuka nnyo bwe ndiraba ku Yesu
Nga nnyanjula bennabuulira;
Nasanyukanga mu maaso ge bwe ndiba
N'emmunyenye mu ngule yange.

title: Kola Ekiro Kijja
first_line: Yesu Mukama wange, Nesig(a) amaanyi go;

verses.lines:
Omulokozi Yesu, Tewali ayinza,
Okutusikula ffe Mu mikono gyo;
Alituloopa y(e) a~ni? Ggwe watununula,
Wawangula Setani, Tetukyamutya.

"Mugende mu nsi zonna, Mubuulir(e) Enjiri"~
Er(i) amawanga gonna Agabeera mu nsi,
Balyoke bategere Yesu Gwe tu~sinza~
Bwali Katonda ddala, Bw'alokola bonna.

Mukama waffe Yesu, (O)tunyiikize ffena,~
Tukolerenga ddala Ebitusaanira;
Tweweyo gy'oli leero, (E)mibiri n'e~myoyo,~
Tuleteng(a) ebirabo N'essanyu lingi nnyo.

"(O)kugaba kwa mukisa, (O)kusinga (o)kuweebwa"~
Byonna bye tuli nabyo Biv(a) eri Katonda;
(O)tukkirizise ebyo, Tukwegayi~ride,~
Tulem(e) okugamba nti Bye byaffe ku bwaffe.

Ayi Katonda Kitaffe, Oyimuse muffe,~
(A)bakunguzi abangi, Balyoke bagende;
Banyikirenga wonna (O)kubuny(a) Enji~ri yo,~
Babulirenga bonna (A)bakulu n'abato.

Nin(a) omukwano gwange, Omulungi ennyo,
Ye Yesu anjagal(a) ennyo, Era omwesigwa:
Njagala mbeerenga naye, Ng(a)ali kumpi nange,
Mbeera wamu ne Yesu, Ng'ali mu nze.

Era bwe mba nga nkoye, Kuba ye ammanyi,
Ampita okusembera, N'ampa amaanyi ge;
Ye antwala mu kkubo lye, (O)musana gwe gwaka,
Mbeera wamu ne Yesu, Ng'ali mu nze.

Mmulag(a) essanyu lyange, Awamu n'ennaku,
Mmulaga ne bye njagala, N'ebinnyiiza byonna;
Andaga ebinsaanira, A'ngamba ngezeeko,
Nnyumya wamu ne Yesu, Ng'ali mu nze.

Amanyi nga njagala, (O)kubuulir(a) ejiri,
Andaga bwe mba njogera Ebyo ebiyamba;
Eby'ekisa kye ekingi (E)kyamuleet(a) okufa:
Tukola fembi Yesu, Ng'ali nange.

Nkwesiga Yesu Mukama, Nkwesiga wekka;
Lab(a) o~mpadd(e) obulo~kozi bwa buwa

Nkwesig(a) ebibi ebingi, Okunziyako;
Nkuvu~namidde Mu~kama (O)muddu wo.

Nkwesig(a) okunnongosanga N'omusayi gwo;
Nakwe~sigang(a) emi~sana n'ekiro.

Nkwesiga okunnu'ngamya Gye ng'enda yonna;
Buli~jjo nnaawuli~ranga Ggwe wekka.

title: Bwendowooza Omusalaba
first_line: Bwe~ ndowoo~z(a) o~musala~ba Mu~kama~ gwe ya~fiira~ko,

verses.lines:
Bwe~ ndowoo~z(a) o~musala~ba Mu~kama~ gwe ya~fiira~ko,
(O)bu~gagga~ bwo~nna obw'e~nsi~ Mbulaba nga te~bulii~mu.

Bwe~ ndab(a) a~ma~zzi n'omu~saayi E~byava~ mu mbi~riizi~ ze,
Ne~ ntegee~r(a) o~kusasi~ra~ N'okwagala kwe~ bwe ku~li.

Ye~su Mu~ka~ma onkuu~me, Ne~m(e) okwe~nyumi~riza~nga,
Ki~no kyo~kka~ kinsanyu~se – Wanjagala n'o~nfii~ri~ra.

Si~nga mba~dde~ n'ensi zo~nna, Ne~ nziwaa~yo Ye~su gy'o~li;
Zo~nna te~za~ndisasu~dde~ (E)bbanja lyang(e) erye~nkan(a) a~wo.

Na~ye ky'o~gala lee~ro, Era kye~ ndeese~ nz(e) e~ri Ggwe,
Kwe~ kwaga~la kwange kwo~nna, Nku~weereze, nku~sanyu~se.

title: Laya Eng'oma Omukuumi
first_line: Lay(a) e'ngoma omukuumi, Labula buli muntu;

verses.lines:
Lay(a) e'ngoma omukuumi, Labula buli muntu;
Abawulira e'ngoma Beenenye balokoke.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Lay(a) engoma omukuumi, Bunyisa mu nsi zonna;
Yesu bwatyo bw'ayagala Labul(a) abantu bonna.

Laya ku buli kasozi Na buli wantu wonna;
Obulokozi butuuke Mu bizinga by'ennyanja.

Mu bibuga ne mu byalo Ne mu gabira gonna
Bakoleze ettabaza Mukama ajja mangu.

Abasibibwa Setani Banafuna eddembe;
Omulokoz(i) atuyita N'okwagala nti "Mujje".

Kale (e)ggye lya Ye~su, mugolokoke, Mulabe Mukama akulembedde,
Mu balabe ba~ngi Yesu mugabe; Mukam(a) atuyi~ta;~ tugende naye.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Kale ggye lya Ye~~su,~ mugolokoke,
Mulabe Mukama akulembe.

Tugende mu maa~so, ng'abalwanyi be; Tusinge Setaani n'amagezi ge,
Tukkirize Ye~su ye ngabo yaffe, N'ekitala kya~ffe~ kye Kigambo kye.

Erinnya lya Ye~su bwe liwulirwa, (A)baddu ba Setaani bakankana nnyo,
Mmwe mugum(e) emyo~yo, ab'oluganda, Mu Mukama wa~ffe~ tuliwangula.

Mu bayite ba~ngi bagende naffe, Balyoke babeere abasajja be,
Kal(e) aboluga~nda tugum(e) emyoyo, Omugabe wa~ffe~ ye wa maanyi nnyo.

title: Zuukuka Ggwe Mwoyo
first_line: Zukuka gwe mwoyo gwange, Leeta amaanyi go;~

verses.lines:
Zukuka gwe mwoyo gwange, Leeta amaanyi go;~
Engule Yesu gy'atuwa Yetaaga kwewaayo.

Ddoboozi lya Mununuzi Ngayita (a)baana be,~
Ye mugabi w'ebirabo Eri ggwe ne bonna.

Abajulirwa bangi nnyo Balaba by'okola,~
Byonna eby'edda bireke Ogende mu maaso.

Yesu Omwanjuzi waffe, Mu lugendo luno,~
Tube mu Ggwe, tuwangule, Tutuuke mu Ggulu.

We~kuume bulijjo, Abalabe bangi,
E~ggye liku'ngana mbiro, Okukulwanyisa.

Tu~nula osabe, (O)lutalo lukyali,
Dda~mu amaanyi bulijjo, Ng'osaba Katonda.

"Ga~kyali mabaga" Toleka kulwana,
O~lutalo lwo lukome, Ng'ofunye engule.

title: Nywereranga ku Katonda
first_line: Nywereranga ku Katonda wonna, Ne bwoba ng'oli mu kabi katya;

verses.lines:
Nywereranga ku Katonda wonna, Ne bwoba ng'oli mu kabi katya;
Oyo lwe lwazi lwaff(e) olw'amaanyi, Mu buli kabi ko~nna.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Leka tugumirenga ku Lwazi lwaffe,
Yesu Olwazi lwa~ffe;
Ffe bwe tuguma tuliyimirira, ---
Mu maaso ge mu kitiibwa.

Wonna nywereranga ku kitufu, Ng'oli mugumu mu kukkiriza
Oyo lwe Lwazi oluwanguza, Eggye lyonn(a) ery'omu~bi.

Wonna nywereranga mu mazima, Byonna byonna birituukirira,
Oyo lwe lwazi omul(i) eddembe, Nga tuwangudde e~nsi.

title: Essuubi Lyange Lizimbiddwa
first_line: (E)ssuubi lyange lizimbiddwa, Ku Yesu n'omusaayi gwe;

verses.lines:
(E)ssuubi lyange lizimbiddwa, Ku Yesu n'omusaayi gwe;
Sirina kirala kyonna, Neesigamye nze ku Yesu.

verses.label: Chorus

verses.lines:
Byonn(a) eby'ensi ne bwe bijja, Ka ndowooz(e) eby'omu ggulu;
Mu bulumi ne mu nnaku, Tayinza kundeka nzekka.

Mazima ge ge ga'ngumya, Ne byonna bye yasuubiza,
Ne bwenfirw(a) ebyange byonna, Ka nneesigenga Ye yekka.

Ekiseera kiri kumpi, Ka nneeweeyo annongoose,
Annaze n'omusaayi gwe, Ampe n'akabonero ke.

Enkomerero ng'etuuuse, Ensange nga neetegese,
Nga nin(a) akabonero ke, Aka Mwoyo Mutukuvu.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Tugenda Sayuni, (E)kibug(a) ekirungi e-nnyo,
Tuluubirira Sayuni~, Eki-buga kya Ka-tonda.

Mangu ajja~ kujja (O)kukutwal(a) e~wuwe,
Eyo y'eri ekifo kyo, Eyo y'eri ekifo kyo,
Waggulu mu ggulu, Waggulu mu ggulu.

Tuyimbe n'e~ssanyu (A)maziga ga~ggwewo,
Kaakano tugenda eyo, Kaakano tugenda eyo,
Eyo mu maka ge, Eyo mu maka ge.

Ggwe Omukri~sta~yo,~ Tunula kaaka~no,
Laba esi~ga~dde,~ Kaseera buseera
Tunula, Yes(u) a~jja,~ (O)mubiri muna~fu,
(O)mulabe wa~ maa~nyi,~ Tunula, saba~nga,

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Omu~krista~yo,
Tu~nu~la,~
E~kiro n'emi~sana,
Tunulanga, -
Tu~nu~la, Saba.

Leka kubo~ngoo~ta, So tobuusabuu~sa
Waliw(o) eki~ra~bo, Kye wasuubizibwa.
Kwe kuwummuli~ra~ Eyo Yesu gy'a~li,
Eyakufii~ri~ra~ Tunula, saba~nga.

Bw'olumbwa o~mu~bi, Yesu ye aku~wa,
Eby'okulwa~nyi~sa~ Gw'obanga wesiga
Lindirira Ye~su,~ Ye gwe musana~ gwo,
Kano ke ka~see~ra,~ Tunula saba~nga.

title: Tunaazimba ku Lwazi Kristo
first_line: Tunazimba ku lwazi Kristo, Olwazi~ olwo (o)lulamu;

verses.lines:
Tunazimba ku lwazi Kristo, Olwazi~ olwo (o)lulamu;
Okubwatuka n'omu~yaga, Nga bizze tetulitya.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ffe~ tu--nazimba, Ffe~ tu--nazimba,
(Tunazimba ku Lwaz(i) olugumu, Tunazimba ku Lwaz(i) olugumu)
Ffe tunazimba ku Lwazi lwaffe,
Yesu Kristo yekka.

(A)bamu bazimba ku mu~senyu, Ku birooto by'obugagga;
Abalala bazimba~ (a)wabi, Ku musingi gw'ekibi!

Waliw(o) abazimba ku~ nnyombo, Ku bitiibwa ku malala;
Naye ggwe nno zimba ku~ Lwazi, Olugumu, ye Yesu.

title: Yesu Kino Kyenjagala
first_line: Yesu kino kye njagala, Omwoyo ng'ogugwo,

verses.lines:
Yesu kino kye njagala, Omwoyo ng'ogugwo,
(O)mugonv(u) er(a) omuwombefu, Ogukukkiriza.

Er(a) omwoy(o) oguwulira (E)biragiro byonna;
Mukama mw'onotuulanga Okugusanyusa.

Omwoyo ogunazibbwa (O)musayi gwa Yesu,
Ogutabeeramu kibi, Ogujjudd(e) ekisa.

(O)mwoyo ogwenkanidd(e) awo Ogumpe Katonda;
Otwal(e) omutima gwange, Onfugire ddala.

title: Ggwe Omukuumi Mbuulira
first_line: Ggwe omukumi mbuulira, Obudde buli kumpi?

verses.lines:
Ggwe omukumi mbuulira, Obudde buli kumpi?
(O)bubonero bw'okujja kwe, Bwo bwali bulabise?
Yesu alijja amangu, Emmambya yiiy(o) esala~;
Wesibe ebyambalo byo, Golokoka bukedde.

Omusana gweyongera, Okwaka mu kkubo lyo?
(O)bubonero buli wantu, Obulág(a) okujja kwe,
Ekondeere nga livuze, Banazuukuka wonna~;
Ababe bonna abaafa, Nga bambadd(e) ogutafa.

Omusana gujja mangu, Ssabbiti ya Jubiri,
Bonna boogera wamu nti, 'Obwakabaka bujje,'
Wewaawo ow'oluganda, Kanaani yaffe ejja~;
Ne Yerusalemi kijja Nga kyakaayakana nnyo.

Lab(a) Ekibug(a) ekya zaabu, Kabaka ku ntebe ye,
Kabaka ow'ekitiibwa, Afuga ensi zonna.
Ku nsozi ez'omusana, Ogwak(a) obulung(i) ennyo~;
Ku migga egy'ekitiibwa Egibunye (e)bimuli.

Omusingi gwaffe munywe~vu ddala,~
Kye kigambo kya~ Yes(u) ekitukuvu;
Kituukirivu so tekya~bulako,~~
[Fuula~nga Yesu ekidddu~kiro kyo.~]x2

Bw'onoyitanga mu nnyanja~ totyanga,~
Mu migg(a) egy'enna~ku tewekanganga:
Kubanga nnaabeeranga wa~mu naawe,~~
[Nnaaku~wonyanga mu nnaku zo~ zonna.~]x2

"Mu bikemo ebiri mu~ kkubo lyo,~
Ekisa kyange~ kinakuyambanga;
Tebigenda kukukola~ko kabi,~~
[Naye~ olivaamu ng'olongo~sebbwa.~]x2

Omuntu bwe yenywereza~ ku Yesu,~
Alimuwonya~ (a)balabe bonna,
Ne mu magye gonna ag'o~mulabe,~
[Tage~nda kumuleka n'a~katono.]x2

Ggwe (o)mwana wa Yesu, lwa~ki webaka?
Amaka gaffe gali kumpi nnyo!
Zukuka, wesib(e) eby'okulwanyisa,
Obudde bunater(a) o~kutuuka!

Amawanga gonna ga~li mu ntalo,
Gonna gakankana olw'entiisa,
Wulira eddoboozi ly'amagaali,
Ggwe omwana wa Yesu~ zukuka!

Tolwa, tolwa, ensi e~no gidduke,
Lab(a) ekitiibwa kyayo kigggwawo.
Meny(a) enjegere za Setani ezo,
Ggw(a) omwana wa Yesu, ddu~ka tolwa!

Yimus(a) amaaso go e~ri eggulu,
Olabe Yesu Kabaka ajja,
Era laba emmambya ye esaze,
Ggw(e) omwana wa Yesu sa~nyuka nnyo!

title: Mwe Abakuumi Ba Sayuuni
first_line: Mmw(e) abakuumi ba Sayuni Obudde buli butya?

verses.lines:
Mmw(e) abakuumi ba Sayuni Obudde buli butya?
Ali kumpi (O)mulokozi Okukomawo ku nsi?
Emmunyenye ey'enkya mugirabye?
Emmunyenye ey'enkya tugirabye!

Obudde butangadde nnyo Tuyimbe olw'essanyu!
Emmambya yiiyo esaze Nga emasamasa nnyo!
Tusanyuke Yesu Mukama ajja!
Tusanyuke Yesu Mukama ajja!

Mmw(e) abakuumi mutegeeze Obubonero bwaffe:
Tusemberedde omwalo, (O)lukalu lulengerwa?
Tulengera (a)maka ag'omu ggulu?
Tulengera (a)maka ag'omu ggulu!

(O)bubonero tubulabye Tunaater(a) okutuuka!
Tugende fenna mu maaso, Twogerere waggulu.
Kusembedde (o)kununulibwa kwaffe!
Kusembedde (o)kununulibwa kwaffe!

Olijja ddi Mukama (O)mulokozi waffe?
Fenna tukwetaaga nnyo Olijja ddi Yesu?
Olunaku lwo lujje Olwekitalo ennyo;~
Ekitiibwa kyo kyonna Kikke ku baana bo.

Tukwetaaga ggwe Yesu Ojje mu bantu bo,
Tulowooza ng(a) oludde Abamu bakooye,
Bakola eby'ekyejo N'abamu ku babo,~
Beetegese batono Okukwaniriza.

Mukama (o)tuzukuse Otukubirize
Tubuulire bonna nti Yesu ojja mangu.
(E)ttabaza zaffe zaake Twesib(e) amazima,~
Era tweteeketeeke Okukwaniriza

Mp(a) okukkiriz(a) okunene, Okutaddirira.
Ne bwe kugezebwa ennyo Abalabe Neme kukanka~na,
Neme~~ ku~kankana.

Obwavu nga busembera, Bwemba mbonaabona
Ng'umirenga byonna byonna, Njigiriza mbeere mu kkubo~ lyo,
Mbeere~~ mu~ kkubo lyo.

Tuwe omuliro ogwo,
Ggwe wawa bajjajja baffe;
Ogwabawukanya mu nsi
Ogwabawang(a) obuzira.

Fuka ku ffe Omwoyo wo
Gwe wawa bajjajja baffe;
Era gwe wawa Paulo,
N'abunyisa Enjiri yo.

(A)maanyi ge wawa Eriya,
Kakati tugetaaga nnyo,
Musa yamasamasanga,
Yobu yagumikiriza.

Jjukir(a) ebiro eby'edda
Oze (o)buggy(a) omulimu gwo!
Tukuwadd(e) emyoyo gyaffe;
Fuka amaanyi go ku ffe.

Ennaku endala ziwedde,
Ssabbiiti yaffe etuuse,
Oze buggy omwoyo gwange
Ku lunaku lwo Mukama.

Tusinze Yesu owekisa,
Eyatuwa olunaku;
Kwe yateeka emikisa,
Egisinga obulungi.

Twebaza Omununuzi,
Neddoboozi eryessanyu,
Atuwe okuwummula,
Kwawummuza abantu be.

Lino lyeddembe lya Yesu,
Lye tuweebwa ngomusingo,
Ogwekiwummulo kiri,
Ekyessanyu ejjereere.

Olunaku lwessanyu, Era nemire mbe.
Lumalawo ennaku, Olulungi ennyo,
Ku lwo abantu bonna, Bakuvunnamire,
Bayimbe Mutukuvu, Katonda atagwaawo.

Lwe lunaku olulonde, Mu maaso ga Yesu;
Ngennimiro ennungi, Omuli amazzi.
Agawonya ennyonta, Mu nsi ekoyesa,
Nga abali ku Pisuga; Tulaba Kanani.

Ekiwummulo kye kino, Kwe tusanyu kira,
Olwokwagala Yesu, Tulengera gyali;
Tuweebwa emikisa Ku lunaku luno,
Lumu tuliwummula, Mu maka ge gali.

title: Tuba nEssanyu mu Mwoyo
first_line: Tuba nessanyu mu mwoyo, Erisinga lyonna,

verses.lines:
Tuba nessanyu mu mwoyo, Erisinga lyonna,
Ku lunaku lwa Ssabbiiti Nga tusinza Yesu.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ssabbiiti ya Yesu, Lunaku lwa ssanyu!
Ku lunaku lwa Ssabbiiti Tusinza Mukama.

Endwadde zomwoyo zonna, Kwe ziwonyezebwa,
Omwo mwe nnonya essanyu Neddembe lyomwoyo.

Mbeera ne Mukama wange, Ngampita nekisa,
Ye nampa okumwagala, Nomutima gwange.

Jjukira olunaku Yesu lwe yatuwa,
Olusinga ennaku obulungi,
Lulina okuwummula okwomu kisa,
Ogukka okuva mu ggulu eri Yesu.

Ku lunaku luno tusinza Mukama,
Eyatugamba nti "Nze kkubo nobulamu".
Bwe tumugoberera Omulokozi ku nsi,
Ddala alitunywesa amazzi agobu lamu.

Ku lunaku luno tumutendereza
Era tusuuta Yesu, Mukwano gwabaana.
Eri abo abagudde, nga oli wa kisa!
Ayi Mukama Yesu, tukwebaza leero.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Twanirize, Twanirize
Ekiwummulo,
Twanirize, Twanirize
Ssabiiti nnungi

Yesu atutusizza, ku Ssabbiiti endala.
Tusabe emikisa, Gye yawa olunaku lwe;
Olusinga mu zonna, ekiwummulo kya Yesu,
Olusinga mu zonna, ekiwummulo kya Yesu.

Tusaba ekisa kyo, Kituuke ku ffe leero.
Tulabe amaaso go, Tugyeko ebibi byaffe.
Tuwummulire mu Ggwe, mu kutegana kwaffe,
Tuwummulire mu Ggwe, mu kutegana kwaffe.

Tuzze okukusinza, Beeranga kumpi naffe,
Tulage ekitiibwa kyo, Nga tuli mu nnyumba yo,
Otuwe okulega ku mbaga yaffe eri,
Otuwe okulega ku mbaga yaffe eri.

Essanyu lyenjiri yo, Lituggyemu ebibi,
Tubaleng a ebibala, Tuwonye ennaku yonna.
Buli Sabbiiti bwetyo, Okutuusa lwolidda,
Buli Sabbiiti bwetyo, Okutuusa lwolidda.

Twaniriza Sabbiiti, Gye twaweebwa Mukama;
Twaniriza nessanyu, Ekirabo ekikulu.

Ekiwummulo kyaffe, Ekyeddembe lyomwoyo;
Kituwonya ennaku, Mu kutegana kwaffe.

Lunaku lutukuvu, Lwa kusinza Katonda
Lutuwa amagezi, Nemikisa mingi nnyo!

title: Nga Kya Ssanyu ku Sabbiiti
first_line: Nga kya ssanyu ku Sabbiiti, Olunaku olulonde,

verses.lines:
Nga kya ssanyu ku Sabbiiti, Olunaku olulonde,
Ebyensi okubizza eri, Tulowooze Yesu.

Kya ssanyu okusaba leero, Ebibi byaffe byonna,
Yesu abitusonyiwe, Olwomusaayi gwe.

Ayogera ebyemirembe, Ye Mukama mwene;
Munakuwalire ebibi, Mbatwale mu ggulu.

Okuggibwako ebibi, Twetaaga maanyi go;
Gwe omanyi ebyomunda, Ekisa kyo kimala.

Webale okutukuuma, Okutuyisa mu nzikiza;
Kaakati nno nga bukedde, Fuka ku ffe ekisa kyo.

Ku lunaku luno oluggya, Oziyize obucwano;
Ku baana abato nga ffe, Ebikemo tubiwangule.

Nga tukola emirimu, Eminene nemitono,
Tuleme kwerowozaako, Okusinga ku bannaffe.

Ka tufaanane nga Yesu, Eyasooka okutwagala;
Owekitiibwa nettendo, Eyegyako ekitiibwa.

Ffe bwe tuti bwe tusaba, Yesu otuyambe twetikke;
Omusalaba gwaffe leero, Era tukugoberere.

title: Yesu Mukama Wulira
first_line: Yesu buli nkya wulira, Okusaba kwange,

verses.lines:
Yesu buli nkya wulira, Okusaba kwange,
Nze kwe nsaba mu linnya lyo, Nga nkowoola gyoli.

Katonda oli Mutukuvu, Okyawa obubi!
Nze nsembera mu maaso go, Lwa kusasira kwo.

Omwoyo wo annungamye, Mu mpenda zo zonna
Longosa buli kye nkola, Era kye ndowooza.

Bonna abatya erinnya lyo, Olibawanguza,
Mukama Ggwe ngabo yaffe, Ggwe bwesige bwaffe.

Omukemi yangamba nti "Ggwe tolina omubeezi!"
Mukama Ggwe, Ngabo yange, Ggwe onkume, onyimuse!

Obulokozi buva gyoli, Mu kifo kyo ekitukuvu;
Nkukowoola neddoBoozi, Bwoyogera nnaalokoka.

Golokoka ondokole! Kubanga Ggwe wawangula;
Abalabe bange bonna, Nomenya amaanyi gaabwe.

Nagalamira okwebaka, Nenzukuka Ggwe nga onkuuma,
Sitya bulabe bwa bantu, Abetooloola okunnumba.

Obudde bwobulamu buziba;
Bwaaka katono ne buwungeera:
Byonna ebyensi bidiba, bikyuka:
Ggwe atadiba atakyuka tondeka!

Siriko kye ntya, Yesu nga wooli:
Beera nange! Ompanguze ebibi:
Owomesa amaziga ne nnaku;
Entaana nokufa tebintiise.

Nga ffe tutunuulira, Eggulu litegeeza,
Ekitiibwa kyo, Yesu, Ngokoleza etta baza ezekiro.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Oli Mutukuvu, Ayi Mukama! Ojjudde eggulu nensi,
Bonna batendereza, Ayi Yesu!

Kiseera kyenzikiza, Kitwetoolodde, Yesu;
Emmunyeenye zibikka Amaaso go Katonda, Tuyimuse.

Mukama wobulamu, Waggulu we emmunyeenye,
Tuwambatire ffenna, Nemikono gyo, Yesu, Tukwagala.

Emmunyeenye bwe zigenda, Era enjuba nomwezi,
Emmambya esale ku nsi, Abantu tuzuukuke, Tukulabe.

title: Enjuba yOmwoyo Gwange
first_line: Enjuba yomwoyo gwange, Omulokozi gwe njagala,

verses.lines:
Enjuba yomwoyo gwange, Omulokozi gwe njagala,
Bwabanga anjakira obudde, Tebujja kunzibirira.

Emitawa na egyensi, Gireme oku nsiiki riza;
Omusana ogwamaaso go, Okunziyiza okulaba.

Ngenda okwebaka ekiro, Onkume mu kabikonna,
Ompaniririz e emikono gyo, Oneebase mu mirembe.

Enkya mu ttuntu, nekiro, Era ne mu bifo byonna,
Ggwe ayagala abaana bo, Beeranga nange, tondeka.

Jjanjaba abalumwa ennyo, Nabatayinza kwebaka,
Wonya endwadde zaabwe bo, Obaggyek o obubi bwonna.

Ennimiro zo zengedde, Ebikungulwa bingi,
Biri buli wantu wonna, Mu biwonvu, mu nsenyi.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Omukunguz i omukulu,
Ggwe Mukama wa byonna.
Tuma ababddu mu nnimiro,
Ekisee ra kituuse.

Tuma ku nkya nga bwakakya, Ne mu ttuntu toleka,
Era nenjuba nggudde, Banoge buli wantu.

Nawe Mukama gwatuma, Kunganya ebibala,
Okutuusa enkomere ro, Olisanyuka mu ye.

title: Bye Tukuwa Biva Gyoli
first_line: Byetukuwa biva gyoli, Kabibe nga byenkana wa!

verses.lines:
Byetukuwa biva gyoli, Kabibe nga byenkana wa!
Byetulina byonna bibyo, Birabo byotuteresa.

Otuwe ekisa tubeereng a Abawanika bo abesigwa;
Nga twesoloza nomwoyo, Ku bintu byetuli nabyo.

Amawang gonna agomu nsi, Getaaga nnyo Omulokozi;
Abantu be wafiirira, Bawaba era basasana.

Gwe mulimu gwaffe fenna, Okukomyawo abakyama;
Okunoony a ababula era, Okujjanjab a abafiiriddwa.

Bwatyo Yesu bwe yakola, Ne yewaay o okutuwonya;
Naffe tumugoberere, Abonoonyi balokoke.

Yesu yatuyigiriza, Ebyo bwe bimukolerwa;
Fenna atunyikize wonna Okugaba nokumddiza.

title: Kiki Ekintukuza?
first_line: Kiki ekintukuza, Musaayi gwa Yesu gwokka,

verses.lines:
Kiki ekintukuza, Musaayi gwa Yesu gwokka,
Kiki ekinnongoosa, Musaayi gwa Yesu gwokka.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Musaayi Gwe gwokka, Gwe guntukuza nze,
Tewali kirala, Musaayi gwa Yesu gwokka.

Mmanyi ekintukuza, Musaayi gwa Yesu gwokka,
Kye mpoza kiri kimu, Musaayi gwa Yesu gwokka.

Tewali kintu kyonna, Musaayi gwa Yesu gwokka,
Tewali kye nkola nze, Musaayi gwa Yesu gwokka.

Essuubi lyange lyonna, Musaayi gwa Yesu gwokka,
Obutukirivu bwange, Musaayi gwa Yesu gwokka.

Era mmutendereza, Olwomusaayi gwe Yesu,
Aweebwe ekitiibwa, Olwomusaayi gwe Yesu.

Nawaayo obulamu okukulo kola
Omusaayi gwange gwayiika ku lulwo.
Okukununula mu kufa, Kiki kyompadde nze?
Okukununula mu kufa, Kiki kyompadde nze?

Naleka entebe eyobwakabaka,
Ewaffe mu ggulu mu kwakayakana,
Ne nzijja mu nnaku ennyingi nokubona abona.
Ne nzijja mu nnaku ennyingi nokubonaabona.

Nalumwa bingi nnyo, siyinza kutenda
Nagumik i riza Nkuwonye okufa.
Nanywera era naguma, ggwe ogumidde ki?
Nanywera era naguma, ggwe ogumidde ki?

title: Mujje Eri Yesu Temulwawo
first_line: Mujje eri Yesu temulwawo, Atudde muffe wano leero,

verses.lines:
Mujje eri Yesu temulwawo, Atudde muffe wano leero,
Fenna atuyita okusembera, Agamba nti "Mujje!"

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ye atwagala, atwagala, Ye atwagala abonoonyi;
Era yajja okutufirira, Ffe tutuuke gyali.

Mujje abazitoowereddwa, Mwenna abakooye nebibi,
Mujje mwenna nnaabawummuza, Mujje mwenna gyendi.

Abantu bonna kiyinzika, Leero okusonyiyibwa ddala!
Kuba ebibi byabakkiriza, Byatwalibwa Yesu.

title: Yimirira ne Yesu
first_line: Yimirira ne Yesu, Ggwe omulwanyi we;

verses.lines:
Yimirira ne Yesu, Ggwe omulwanyi we;
Yimusa ebendera ye, So togissa wansi!
Mu ntalo zaffe zonna, Atukulembere,
Awangule omulabe, Ye abe Kabaka.

Yimirira ne Yesu, Engoma erawa;
Olutalo lunene, Golokoka mangu!
Abantu be mulwane Abalabe bangi nnyo,
Kale muddem u amaanyi, Tujja kuwangula.

Yimirira ne Yesu, Weesige amaanyi ge,
Ggwe oli munafu nnyo, Weesige Ye yekka!
Mu maanyi gEnjiri Ye, Wamu nokusaba,
Mu buli kabi konna, Lwaniranga mu Ye.

Yimirira ne Yesu, Olutalo terulwe,
Olwa leero kulwana, Enkya buwanguzi!
Awangula aliweebwa, Engule eyobulamu,
Alifuga ne Yesu, Emirembe gyonna.

title: Yesu Akuyita Okugenda
first_line: Yesu akuyita okugenda gyali Akuyita, ojje leero!

verses.lines:
Yesu akuyita okugenda gyali Akuyita, ojje leero!
Lwaki ova ku oyo akwagala Nowanganguka bwotyo?

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Akuyita, Ojje leero!
Akuyita ojje leero, Akuyita ojje leero
Yesu akuyita nokwagala kwe okungi.
Yesu akuyita nekisa ekingi, nokwagala kwe okungi.

Jjangu gyali anaakuwummuza, Akuyita, ojje leero!
Mutwalire omugugu gwonna, Takugobe nakamu.

Jjangu, Yesu akulindiridde, Genda gyali mangu tolwa!
Twala ebibi byo byonna gyali, Genda mangu tolwawo.

Akuyita nokwagala okungi, Owulire eddoboozi!
Amukkiriza alisanyuka, Dduka ogende gyali.

title: Yesu Ali Ku Luggi
first_line: Yesu ali ku luggi, Akulindiridde nnyo,

verses.lines:
Yesu ali ku luggi, Akulindiridde nnyo,
Muyingize tagenda, Ye Mutukuvu Yesu,
Omwana wa Katonda.

Ggulawo omutima gwo, Bwonolwa anakuvaako,
Ye mukwano gwo ddala, Omutima gwo agutaasa,
So takwabulirenga.

Yesu ava mu ggulu, Alye awamu naawe,
Alyoke akulokole, Kkiriza okwagala kwe,
Akutwale mu ggulu.

title: Yesu Ayita Nekisa Ekingi
first_line: Yesu ayita nekisa ekingi, Ggwe nange atuyita;

verses.lines:
Yesu ayita nekisa ekingi, Ggwe nange atuyita;
Ayimiridde nga alindirira, Alinze ggwe era nange.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mujje, eka! Mwenna abakoye ennyo!
Yesu abayita nekisa ekingi,
Komawo mangu eka.

Yesu yegayirira tunagaana? Yegayirira fenna,
Lwaki tugaana ekisa kye kino, Kyatulaze ffe fenna?

Ekiseera kyekisa kye kiyita, Olinze kuggalirwa?
Esaawa eyokufa esembera, Esemberedde ffenna.

Lowooza okusuubiza kwe kwonna, Kwasuubiza ggwe nange:
Ffe twayonoona naye asonyiye, Atusonyiye fenna.

Yesu wange yangamba nti, "Jjangu owummule;
Wummula ggwe akooye ennyo Mu kifuba kyange".
Ayi Yesu, najja gyoli, Nali omunaku:
Nawummuliranga mu Ggwe,
Ompadde essanyu lyo.

Yesu wange yangamba nti, "Ensi ya nzikiza,
Tunulira Nze ofune Omusana gwomwoyo".
Natunula eri Yesu, Ye nanjak ira nze,
Kantambulirenga mu Ye,
Ekkubo lyessanyu.

Omusumba omulungi Akuyita leero;
Jjangu mu kisibo kye, Owummule mu ye.
Obanga oli mukadde, Oba muvubuka,
Wulira eddoboozi lye, Yingira ekku bo lye.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Akuyita nekisa ekingi, "Jjangu gyendi eyakyama edda;
Komawo ggwe nga omutambuze, Komawo gyendi nate".

Omusumba omulungi yawaayo obulamu,
Kakano akuyita Agamba nti "Jjangu,
Dduka oleme okufa, Waliwo akabi;
Obanga oli mukadde; oba muvubuka".

Tolwa naye yanguwa dduka emisege:
Eginoonya endiga Enkulu nobuto.
Omusumba omulungi Akuyita "Tolwa;
Jjangu gyendi kakano, Owummule mu Nze".

Waliwo Omwoyo ogugamba,
"Mbuze katono okukkiriza."
Naye ggwe omwonoonyi, leero togamba nti,
"Bwe ndifuna ebbanga, ndikkiriza".

Toziba matu go, munnange:
Omwoyo wekisa bwakuyita.
Yesu akuyita, ne bamalayika,
Omwana eyazawa, Oko mewo!

Omukisa tosubwa nate,
Oba oli awo toliddayo:
Okuwulira Mwoyo, ngakuyita ojje,
Ekiseera kijja, lwana koma.

title: Yesu Atuyita Ffenna
first_line: Yesu atuyita fenna, Tukole mu nnimiro;

verses.lines:
Ne bwotogenda wala nnyo kunoonya ababula,
Ojja kubasanga bangi, kumpi ku miriraano,
Oba toli mwogezi nnyo, Okwenkana Paulo,
Yogera ku Yesu kyokka, Nga yafa kulwa bonna.

Obanga toli mukuumi, Ku bbugwe wa Sayuni
Nga obalaga ku Yesu "Ekkubo nobulamu."
Gwe nyiikira mu kusaba, Ye anakola byonna,
Ojja kubanga Aloni, Okuwanirira Musa.

Abantu bazikirira. Mukama akuyita,
Togezako kugamba nti "Nze siriiko kye nnyinza."
Kola gwonna gwakuwadde, Era kola nessanyu;
Bwakuyita ddamu bwoti Nti "Nze nzuuno: Ontume".

Wulira ekyessanyu, Yesu alokola
Ka tukibunye wonna, Yesu alokola,
Bunyisa mu nsi zonna, Ku nsozi nebizinga,
Katonda bwatugamba, Yesu alokola.

Bulira buli muntu, Yesu alokola.
Tegeeza abonoonyi, Yesu asonyiwa.
Mmwe ebizinga muyimbe, Namayengo ge nyanja,
Ensi eyogaane nnyo, Yesu alokola.

Muyimbe mmwe abalwanyi, Yesu alokola.
Olwokufa kwe kwokka, Yesu alokola.
Ne bwobeera mu nnaku, Ngolumwa mu mwoyo gwo,
Ne mu kufa yimba nti, Yesu alokola.

Yimba nnyo mu bbanga nti, Yesu alokola.
Ensi zonna ziyimbe, Yesu alokola.
Obulamu bwa buwa, Buulira mu mawanga,
Kwe kuwangula kwaffe, Yesu alokola.

title: Buli Muntu Yenna Awulire
first_line: Buli muntu yenna awulire Ebigambo byOmulokozi wensi,

verses.lines:
Buli muntu yenna awulire Ebigambo byOmulokozi wensi,
Bunya wonna wonna nti akkiriza, Alirokoka mu ye.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Buli awulira, ekigambo kye
Ategeze abalala mu nsi yonna,
Kitaffe ayita — Komawo eka
Buli awulidde jjangu.

Buli muntu yenna asembere, Olugggi olwomu ggulu lugguddwawo,
Yesu ge mazima, lye Kkubo lyaffe, Ekibalwisa kiki?

Buli muntu yenna ayagala, Ekigambo kya Katonda atalimba;
Kale bannange, tubuny e ettendo lye, Atugabidde buwa.

title: Waliwo Oluggi Oluggule
first_line: Waliwo oluggi oluggule, Omwo mwe ndabira nze,

verses.lines:
Waliwo oluggi oluggule, Omwo mwe ndabira nze,
Okwagala kwa Mukama, Okwamunfiiriza nze.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nga kwagala kunene nnyo,
Olwo lwaggulwa ku lwange?
Lwange, Lwange?
Lwagulwa ku lwange?

Oluggi olwo lwa bonna, Abanoonya obulokozi;
Abagagga era nabaavu, Lwa buli muntu yenna.

Tulwanyise omulabe, Oluggi lukyagguddwa,
Kkiriza ofune engule, Wesige okwagala kwe.

Fenna bwe tulisomoka, Nga tuwangudde ensi;
Ne tutikkirwa engule, Tunamuyimbiranga.

Omusawo ali kumpi, Mukama owekisa;
Azzaamu amaanyi abakooye, Wulira eddoboozi lye.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Asinzibwa mu ggulu, Nasinzibwa ne ku nsi;
Kirungi okuyimba, Ku linnya lye Yesu.

Ayi Omwana gwendiga, Nzikiriza okufa kwo;
Nsanyukira erinnya lyo, Eryomuwendo mungi.

Erinnya lye lindokola, Erinnya lye lye lyokka,
Nsanyuka okuwulira, Yesu nga asinzibwa.

Bwalikomawo nengule, Engule eyobulamu;
Tulituula wamu naye, Twekulise ensi eno.

Ozitowereddwa okooye, onafuwadde?
Yesu agamba "Genda gyali owummule!"

Alina bubonero ki obumundaga?
Enkovu mu bibatu ne ku bigere.

Omutwe gwe guliko engule yobwakabaka?
Guliko engule, naye ya maggwa.

Nze okumugoberera nfunamu kiki?
Okukola namaziga, nennaku.

Bwemmulemerako Yesu edda alimpa ki?
Oliwangula amagombe nokufa.

Bwemmusaba okunsembeza tangobe waali?
Okugoba, nedda, nedda, tayinza.

Bwe ngumira byonna byonna alimpa omukisa?
Abatukuvu bagamba — Wewaawo!

title: Waliwo Ensulo Eyomusaayi
first_line: Waliwo ensulo eyomusaayi, Okuva mu Yesu;

verses.lines:
Waliwo ensulo eyomusaayi, Okuva mu Yesu;
Abonoonyi banaabamu, Nebawona ekibi.
Nebawona ekibi, Nebawona ekibi,
Abonoonyi banaabamu, Nebawona ekibi.

Ku luli lwendizuukira, Okuva mu ntaana,
Amaanyi go agalokola, Gendiyimbangako.
Gendiyimbangako, Gendiyimbangako,
Amaanyi go agalokola, Gendiyimbangako.

Mukama netaag a okuba omulungi, Era njagala otulenga mu nze
Ommalemu byonna ebitasaana Ontukuze okusinga omuzira.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Onongose mu musayi gwo,
Ebyonono byange byonna biggwewo.

Ntunulira nga oyima mu ggulu, Ombere okuleka buli kibi,
Newaddeyo nze nna mu mikono gyo, Onnaaze mu musaayi gwo ntukule.

Mukama Yesu kino kye nsaba, Nga bwe wattibwa ku lwebibi byange,
Omusaayi gwo gunnazek o ebibi, Ntukule okusinga omuzira.

Mukama olaba bwe nkusuubira, Jjangu ompe omutima omuggya,
Ggwe atagamba bajja nti "Muveewo," Onnaaze mu musaayi gwo ntukule.

title: Njija Ku Musaalaba
first_line: Njija ku musalaba, Nze omunaku ennyo

verses.lines:
Njija ku musalaba, Nze omunaku ennyo
Byonna ebyensi si kintu, Njagala bulokozi.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nesiga Ggwe, Mukama,
Ggwe Omwana gwEndiga
Eyafa kulwa ababi,
Ndokola ayi Yesu.

Nsaba mbeere ne Yesu, Naye siri mulungi;
Ye yekka annongoose, Kubanga yansuubiza.

Byonna mbiwaayo gyoli, Emikwano ne byonna,
Omwoyo nomubiri, Byonna bibenga bibyo.

Yesu bwobeera mu nze, Mbeera mutuukirivu,
Nnongoosebwa mu byonna, Nkwebaza Ayi Yesu!

title: Mukama Kino Kyensaba
first_line: Mukama kino kye nsaba, Ebyonoono byange byonna;

verses.lines:
Mukama kino kye nsaba, Ebyonoono byange byonna;
Obinaaze namazzi go; Ontukuze, ontukuze.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nnaaza munda ne kungulu, Onnongoose nomuliro;
Ebibi byange biggwewo, Ontukuze, ontukuze.

Bwonompa okwolesebwa, Ononsanyusa omwoyo,
Naye omutima omulungi, Ggwe nneegomba, gwe nneegomba.

Bwononnongoos a omutima, Kye kirabo ekisinga,
Ne gufaanana ngogugwo, Omutukuvu, omutukuvu.

Ekkubo ebbi ka ndireke, Mu birowoozo ebibi,
Naye mu kufuba kwange, Sisobola kwetukuza.

title: Wanaazibwa Mu Musaayi?
first_line: Wanaazibwa mu musaayi gwa Yesu, Omusaayi gwOmwana gwEndiga?

verses.lines:
Wanaazibwa mu musaayi gwa Yesu, Omusaayi gwOmwana gwEndiga?
Wesiga ekisakye olwaleero, Onaabye mu musaayi gwa Yesu?

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Onnabye Mu musaayi, Ogwa Yesu ogunaaze ekibi?
Engoye zo zitukudde ngomuzira, Onaabye mu musaayi gwa Yesu?

Bulijjo gwe otambula ne Yesu, Onaabye mu musaayi gwa Yesu?
Wekwese mu Yesu eyakomererwa, Onaabye mu musaayi gwa Yesu?

Bwalijja alisanga engoye zo njeru, Zozeddwa mu musaayi gwendiga?
Oliba osaanidde gwe eggulu, Ngonaabye mu musaayi gwendiga?

Yambula engoye zikongedd e ekibi; Onaabe mu musaayi gwendiga,
Waliwo ensulo ekulukuta enaazaa, Naazibwa mu musaayi gwendiga.

title: Nakyama Okuva ku Yesu
first_line: Nakyama okuva ku Yesu, Nkomawo eka;

verses.lines:
Nakyama okuva ku Yesu, Nkomawo eka;
Ebibi byange binko yezza, Nkomawo eka.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nkomawo, nkomawo; Sikyabungeeta,
Nkwata mu mikono gyo, Nkomawo eka.

Ebiro bingi nga nnyonoona, Nkomawo eka;
Nnakuwadde nnyo Olwebibi, Nkomawo eka.

Yesu nkoye okubu ngeeta, Nkomawo eka;
Okwagala kwo kwe nneesiga, Nkomawo eka.

Musaayi gwo gwennee taaga, Nkomawo eka,
Ntukuza nsinge omuzira, Nkomawo eka.

Yesu angamba nti, "Ggwe tolina maanyi;
Tunulanga osabe, Nze nnaakuwanga byonna".

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Yansasulira Ebbanja lyonna,
Nayonoonebwa ekibi,
Ye nantukuza nze.

Amaanyi go gokka, Gegawony a ekibi;
Gakyusa nomutima, Omugumu ngejjinja.

Sirina kalungi, Kasaanira kisa;
Ka njoze engoye zange, Mu musaayi gwo Yesu.

Bwendiyimirira, Mu maaso gentebe;
Nditeeka engule yange, Ku bigere byo Yesu.

Awo ku musalaba, Awali amazzi
Aganaaza ebibi, Woba onkuumira.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ku musaalaba gwe, Kwe nenyumiriza,
Okutuusa nga mpumudde, Mu ggulu ewaffe.

Okwo nze omunaku, Kwe nsanga eddembe;
Omusana gwa Yesu, Ne gunjakira nze.

Kwe nsanga Yesu wange, Ne yeeraga gyendi;
Nga ampa amaanyi ge, Gabeeranga mu nze.

Awo we nnabeeranga, Nga neesiga Yesu;
Alyoke annongose, Ye antuuse gyali.

title: Nze Omwonoonyi Lukulwe
first_line: Nze omwonoonyi lukulwe, Yesu yafa ku lwange;

title: Newaddeyo Gyoli Yesu
first_line: Newaddeyo gyoli Yesu, Newaddeyo nze nzenna;

verses.lines:
Newaddeyo gyoli Yesu, Newaddeyo nze nzenna;
Nkwagala era nkwesiga, Woli we nnabeeranga.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Newayo gyoli, Newaayo gyoli,
Newaddeyo gyoli Yesu, Newaayo gyoli.

Newaddeyo gyoli Yesu, Ndi wano mu maaso go;
Nziyako ebyensi byonna, Onfuule omwana wo.

Newaddeyo gyoli Yesu, Onnaze ontukuze;
Omwoyo wo abe nange, Ntegeere nga ndi wuwo.

Newaddeyo gyoli Yesu, Mpulira amaanyi go,
Nessanyu lyobulokozi, Nkwebaza nnyo Mukama.

Olwokukkiriza, Nyinza okulaba Ggwe Omulokozi,
Wulira nga nsaba, Ggyawo ebibi byange,
Okuva kakano mbeere wuwo.

Ekisa kyo Yesu, Kimpa amaanyi go Ndiwangula,
Nga bwewanfiirira, Kkiriza kye nkuwa
Obulamu bwange Bukozese.

title: Okooye Nnyo?
first_line: Okooye nnyo, Ozitowereddwa? Tegeeza Yesu, tegeeza Yesu;

verses.lines:
Okooye nnyo, Ozitowereddwa? Tegeeza Yesu, tegeeza Yesu;
Olina ennaku nnyingi ku mwoyo? Genda eri Yesu totya.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Tegeeza Yesu, tegeeza Yesu, Ye mukwano gwo ddala;
Tewali mulala amusinga, Genda eri Yesu totya.

Okulukusa amaziga mangi? Tegeeza Yesu, tegeeza Yesu.
Olina ebibi ebitamanyiddwa, Genda eri Yesu totya.

Otidde nnyo olwentiisa egya? Tegeeza Yesu, tegeeza Yesu.
Weralikiridd e olwokujja kwe, Genda kaakano gyali.

Obanga oyagala emirembe, Tegeeza Yesu, tegeeza Yesu;
Olyoke osanyuke lwalidda, Genda kaakano gyali.

title: Kabaka We Ggulu
first_line: Kabaka we Ggulu, Tutenda erinnya lyo,

verses.lines:
Kabaka we Ggulu, Tutenda erinnya lyo,
Tukusinze! Ggwe omuwanguzi,
Nannyini kitiibwa, otufuge leero, Omutonzi!

Omwoyo Omutukuvu, Ggwe otuwolereze,
Fenna leero! Ggwe Ayinza byonna, Fuga emitima,
Totuvangako Ggwe Owamaanyi.

Nkwetaaga bulijjo, Ayi Yesu;
Sirina mirembe, Wantu wonna.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nkwetaaga ayi Yesu, Bulijjo nkwetaaga;
Ompe omukisa gwo, Jjangu gyendi.

Netaaga obeere, Kumpi nange;
Ebikemo byonna, Ggwe obigoba.

Nkwetaaga mu ssanyu, Ne mu nnaku,
Ggwe obeere nange, Neme okufa.

Onjigirizenga, Byoyagala,
Ebisuubizo byo, Bibe mu nze.

Ekiseera kyonna, Ayi Mukama,
Netaaga onfuule, Omwana wo.

title: Bwenfuna Eddembe
first_line: Bwe nfuna eddembe mu bula mu bwange,

verses.lines:
Bwe nfuna eddembe mu bula mu bwange, Oba bwe mbeera mu nnaku,
Onjigirize okukkirizanga, Buli mbeera yonna mwontadde.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines: Mirembe, Mirembe; Mukama njagala mirembe.

Setani bwaleeta ebi kemo bye, Yimusa essuubi lyange,
Nti Yesu alaba obunafu bwange, Era Ye atambula nange.

Ekigambo kino kyokka kye neesiga, Nti ebibi byange byonna,
Byakomererwa ku musaalaba gwe, Mukama Yesu yeebazibwe.

Mukama ayanguye olunaku, Olulibikkula byonna;
Essuubi liritukirira lwalidda, Ndimulaba Yesu namaaso.

title: Bwe Tuba Ne Yesu
first_line: Bwe tuba ne Yesu, Nga tumugondera

verses.lines:
Bwe tuba ne Yesu, Nga tumugondera
Atuwa omusana mu kkubo; Tukola byasiima
Aba wamu naffe, Ne bonna abamugondera.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mugondere, Tewali mulala,
Wabula Yesu yekka, Gwoba ogondera.

Tewaba nzikiza, Tewabaawo bire,
Omusana gwe gutwakira; Okutya kuggwawo,
Tewaba kwekanga, Aba naffe abamugondera.

Tetulitegeera Kwagaka kwe kwonna,
Okutuusa lwe tulyewaayo; Kubanga ekisa kye,
Nessanyu lyagaba, Byabo bokka abamwesiga.

Mu kutabagana, Nga tutudde waali,
Oba nga tutambula naye, Kyagamba, tukole,
Gyatuma, tugende, Tetutya twesige, tugonde.

title: Kirungi Okwesiga Yesu
first_line: Kirungi okwesiga Yesu, Nekigambo kye kyonna;

verses.lines:
Kirungi okwesiga Yesu, Nekigambo kye kyonna;
Nebyo Ye bye yasuubiza, Ebyava mu kamwa ke.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Yesu, Yesu, nga mmwesiga; Nga mmukakasizza nnyo!
Yesu, Yesu, Omulungi! Mpa ekisa nkwesigenga!

Kirungi okwesiga Yesu, Twesige omusaayi gwe;
Tukkirize tunaazibwe, Mu nsulo etukuza.

Kirungi okwesiga Yesu, So si bikolwa byaffe,
Mu Ye tufune obulamu, Essanyu nemirembe.

Nsanyuka, Kuba mmwesiga, Yesu Owomukwano;
Era mmanyi ali nange, Okutuusa enkomerero.

Tulina Omukwano gwaffe, Atuyamba bulijjo.
Bwe tunaamugoberera, Taatugobere bweru,
Wano tetufune eddembe, Wano tufuna ennaku;
Omulokozi ye Yesu, Omukwano gwabonoonyi.

Tulina Omukwano gwaffe, Alina amaanyi mangi;
Nolwekyo aboluganda, Tulemenga okuya.
Tumwesige atukuuma, Tatuleka mu bibi,
Yesu ye Mukuumi waffe, Omukwano gwabonoonyi.

Tulina omukwano gwaffe, Atulungamya fenna;
Mu kizikiza ekikutte, Ye musana gwabantu,
Tulemenga okunyoma, Omukisa gwa Yesu,
Ka tutendereze oyo Omukwano gwabonoonyi.

Ayi Yesu amaaso gange, Tegakulaganga;
Ekizikiza bwe kibikka, Ssiraba maaso go.

Ssikulaba ssiwulira, Ddoboozi lyo Yesu!
Nga obeera kumpi nange, Mu buli kusaba.

Ensi terinaayo kifo, Kya ssanyu nga ekyo;
Ekifo we ndabaganira, Ne Yesu munnange.

Nga ebirooto ebyessanyu, Ebijja mu tulo,
Embala ye ngirowoza, Ne nfuna okwesiima.

Mukama Ye Musumba setagenga,
Angalamiza mu muddo omuto;
Antwala awali oluzzi oluteefu,
Akomyawo emme me yange munteeko.

Annungamya mu butuukirivu bwe,
Newakubadde nga mbeera mu kufa;
Nga Ggwe oli nange seraliikirira,
Oluga lwo nomuggo gwo bye binkuuma.

Abala be ne bwe babawo ondiisa,
Onsiize amafutago ku mutwe;
Ekikompe kyange kijjude omubisi
Nze nabeeranga ne Yesu bulijjo.

Obulungi bwo nekisa kyo Kitange,
Kabaka era Katonda wange nze;
Bibee renga ku nze buli gye mbeera,
Okutuusa lwolimpa engule yo.

Buli wantu wonna Yesu gyantwala,
Buli wantu wonna siriko kye ntya
Yesu bwaba nga wali mba nessanyu,
Yesu nga wali mbeera nemirembe.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mukama wobeera, Siriko kye ntya;
Buli wantu wonna nga ndi ne Yesu.

Buli wantu wonna Yesu tondeka,
Bonna nga bandese Gwe beera nange;
Bwompisa mu kkubo eryakanyigo,
Jjangu kumpi nnyo nga bwe wasuubiza!

Wonna we nsula nga ndi wamu naawe,
Oba nga kifo kya kubonabona;
Ntegeera nga Ggwe olimponya byonna,
Yesu wobeera ennaku ziggwawo.

Waayo ekiseera eri Katonda;
Nyumyanga ne Yesu mu Kigambo kye,
Kwananga ababe, Yamba abanafu
Noonyang a omukisa gwoyo bulijjo.

Waayo ekiseera eri Katonda;
Beeranga mu kyama wamu ne Yesu.
Olwokumulaba ofuuke nga ye,
Ne mu mpisa zo nga olaga Yesu.

Waayo ekiseera eri Katonda,
Era linda ye akukulembere,
Mu ssanyu, mu nnaku, beeranga naye,
Tunuulira Yesu nEkigambo kye.

Waayo ekiseera eri Katonda;
Obeere neddemu mu mutima gwo.
Bwokulemberwa Omwoyo we yekka,
Akusanyize okumuwereza.

title: Kye Kiseera Kyokusaba
first_line: Kye kiseera kyokusaba, Ka nve ku bigambo byensi;

verses.lines:
Kye kiseera kyokusaba, Ka nve ku bigambo byensi;
Kangende eri Kitange, ntwale obuzibu bwange.
Mu biro byentalo zange, kampwebwe okuwummula,
Anamponya omulabe, nange ndyoke mmusinzenga.

Kye kiseera kyokusaba, Ntwala ebigambo byange,
Eri Oyo omwesigwa, Ansanyusa bwenneetaaga,
Atangoba mu maaso ge, Nga nesiga ekigambo kye,
Ka mmukwase buli kintu, Mu kiseera kyokusaba.

Kye kiseera kyokusaba, Angumyenga mu bikemo;
Ayimuse omwoyo gwange, Andage amaka gange,
Bwalinnyambaza ogutafa, Ngampadde ekirabo kye,
Ndiyimba nessanyu lingi, Nga ngenda eyo ewaffe.

Kwata omukono gwange, ndi munafu,
Siyinza nze ku tambula nzekka;
Naye bwonyweza siriko kye nnaatya,
Nawangula byonna ebintiisa.

Omulokozi, kwata omukono gwange,
Onsembeze kumpi nOmwoyo gwo;
Enzikiza ekutte, onjakire nze,
Neme okuva mu kkubo lyeddungi.

Kwata omukono gwange, mu bulwadde,
Nga nzirika nga nnaater a okufa;
Bwobeera nange nnaafuna emirembe,
Nnaatambula nessanyu lingi nnyo.

Kye kiseera ekirungi kyokusaba nate,
Katufukamire mu maaso ga entebbe;
Nga tukkiriza Yesu, tumusemberere,
Mwe abakooye, mujje — Muwummule leero!

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Tufukamire, nga tukungane,
Mwe abakooye, mujje — Muwummule leero!

Kye kiseera ekirungi kyokusemberera,
Nokumusinza Yesu Omulokozi;
Mukama awulira okusaba kwaffe,
Mwe abakooye, mujje — Muwummule leero!

Kye kiseera tutwale Ennaku zaffe zonna,
Tuziweeyo eri Oyo atwagala;
Atuwanguze fenna Mu bikemo byaffe,
Mwe abakooye, mujje — Muwummule leero!

Kye kiseera ekirungi, Yesu yasuubiza,
"Munoonye mulabe; Era mukkiririze;"
Katumwesige leero, Nokumugondera,
Mwe abakooye, mujje — Muwummule leero!

Nnaakugoberera Yesu, Yonna gyonontwalanga;
Gyogenda nange nnaagenda, Yesu nkugoberere.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nnaakugoberera Yesu, Ggwe eyanfirira nze;
Bonna ne bwebakuleka, Nze nnaakugoberera.

Mu kkubo omuli amaggwa, Ezzibu ngennyaj a embi,
Ggwe eyansooka okugenda, Nnaakugobereranga.

Bwennaabonyabonyezebwa, Mu bikemo ebizibu;
Nzijukiza wakemebwa, Nsanyuke ngoberere.

Bwe nnaaba wano mu nnaku, Nga njabuliddwa bonna,
Ggwe eyayabulirwa bonna, Nze nnaakugoberera.

Bwontwala ku Yoludaani, Nsomoke amayengo,
Gwe eyansook a okusomoka, Siitye nnaagoberera.

Omununuzi wange
Oluyimba lwange
Mulokozi ansanyusa,
Mu bulumi bwange.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Omununuzi Yesu,
Nakuyimbangako,
Owomukwano asinga
Tewali akwenkana!

Mulokozi nkwesiga
Mulungamya wange,
Gwosinga abantu bonna,
Abomu nsi muno.

Gwe oli ssuubi lyange,
Mu bulamu bwange.
Bwembeera mu nzikiza,
Mu maziga gange.

Gwoli luyimba lwange,
Mu nsi eno eyekibi,
Gwe essanyu lyange wano,
Era ne mu Ggulu!

title: Mukama Nze Nnina Ebibi
first_line: Mukama, nze nnina ebibi, Naye ekisa kyo kingi;

verses.lines:
Yesu, Omwana gwendiga, Olwebibi byange wafa,
Olwomusaayi gwo nkukkiriza,
Nzomwonoonyi, Yesu nzijja.

"Ajja gyendi simugoba," Ekigambo kyo nkikkiriza,
Kuba okulimba toyinza,
Nzomwonoonyi, Yesu nzijja.

Wansi womusalaba We nyimirira nze
Guli nga ekisikirize Kyolwazi mu ddungu;
Era guli nga ekisulo Mu lukool a olubi,
Abatambuz e abanaku We bawummulira.

We guli we mpummuza Omugugu gwange,
Omusana nga gwaka nnyo, Newogoma mu gwo;
Bwe ngufumitiriza ko, Ndowooza nnyo Yesu
Eyafa ku musalaba, Mmufukaamirira.

Ebyekitalo bibiri, Bye njatula leero:
Ebibi byange bingi naye Okwagala kwo kungi;
Omusalaba gunsanyusa Okusinga byonna,
Ensi leka empiteko, Ndaby e ekitiibwa kyo!

Mpu~lira oyita, Nze okujja gy'oli;
Nnaazibwe n'omusayi gwo, - - Ogwe Gologoosa.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mukama nzija! Nzija kaakano!
Nnaaza, mu musaayi gwo, - - -
Ogwe Gologoosa.

Wa~dde ndi munafu, Onompa amaanyi;
Onnonnaaza n'ontukuza, Mbuleko ebbala.

A~mpita ye Yesu, Mbeer(e) omukkiriza;
Nfun(e) essuubi n'emirembe, Ku nsi ne mu ggulu.

(O)mu~saayi gwe gwa maanyi, Ekisa kye kingi;
Tusuute Kri-sto Mukama, Ye ge maanyi gaffe!

title: Kitange Nze Nkukowoola
first_line: Kitange, nze nkukowoola, Ggwe Mubeezi wange;

verses.lines:
Kitange, nze nkukowoola, Ggwe Mubeezi wange;
To~nzigyako ku~kuuma kwo, Ne~me okubu~la.

(O)mugabi w'okukkiriza, nze nkutunulidde;
E~kirabo kyo~ nkyetaaga, we~ kitali nfa~ nze.

Mmanyi nga tondeke kufa, Yogera, omponye;
Ka~kano ka nni~ndirire, O~mwoyo (o)mubee~zi.

Ndijjula essanyu lingi, Nga ndab(a) amaaso go;
Mpu~liza eki~gambo kyo, Mpee~bwe n'ekisa~ kyo.

Nzikiriza ddala Yesu, Nga wanfirira nze;
Noo~yiwa omu~saayi gwo, Nso~nyiyibw(e) ebi~bi.

Ompise, Yesu Mukama wange, N'eddoboozi (e)ry'eki~sa;
Naye njagala okusemberera, Kumpi nnyo naawe, gy'oli!

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Onsembe - ze, Kumpi kumpi nnyo,
Nsembeza gy'oli Yesu;
Onsembe - ze, Kumpi, kumpi nnyo, - - -
Awo ku musaalaba.

Fuka omwoyo wo ow'ekisa Ku nze nkuweereze~nga;
(O)mutima gwange gubeere ku Ggwe, Nkwagalenga Ggwe wekka.

Okwagala kwo kwa buziba nnyo, Ndikutegeera ntuu~se;
Kutumbira waggulu ewala, Gye siyinza kulaba.

title: Twala Ensi, Ompe Yesu
first_line: Twala ensi ompe Yesu, Eby'ensi tebirwawo;

verses.lines:
Twala ensi ompe Yesu, Eby'ensi tebirwawo;
Naye (o)kwagala kwa Yesu, Kwo kwa mirembe gyonna.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ekisa kya Yesu kingi! Nga wa kwagala kungi!
Oyo eyatununula, N'atuwa obulamu.

Twala ensi, ompe Yesu, Ye ansanyus(a) omwoyo;
Yesu bw'aba nga ankuma, Siriiko ky'entya kyonna.

Twala ensi ompe Yesu, Bw'aba nga anjakira;
Mu lugendo lwange lwonna, Nnaafuna omusana.

Twala ensi, ompe Yesu, Nze neesiga kufa kwe;
Okutuusa lw'alintwala, Ne mulaba n'amaaso.

Sirika, Sirika, Mu yeekaalu Ye,
Sirika Owulirize Mukama

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Tambula mpola, Mu Watukuvu we;
[Tambula mpola, mpola]
Tambula mpola, Tumusemberere.
[Tambula mpola, mpola]

Sirika, Sirika, mu Watukuvu,
Wuliriz(a) obubaka obw'ekisa.

Twewombeke fenna nga tumusaba,
Tulyoke tulege ku birungi bye

Sirika, Sirika (a)kuwe (e)kisa kye,
Sirika olindirire Mukama.

title: Fuga Obulamu Bwange
first_line: Fug(a) obulamu bwange, Ggwe Yesu Kabaka,

verses.lines:
Fug(a) obulamu bwange, Ggwe Yesu Kabaka,
Ggwe amagezi gange, Mu byonn(a) ebinnema;
Yesu, beeranga mu nze, Mu byonna bye nkola,
Mbeere ng(a) endabirwamu, Ndage (e)kitiibwa kyo.

Ka mbeere yekaalu yo, Omutali kibi,
Ekitiibwa kyo kyonna, Nga kyeraga mu nze;
Eby'ensi ka mbiveeko, Okuva kaakano
Mbeere muddu wo ddala, Nkole by'ondagira.

Ayi Yesu, nze nzenna, Ka mbeeranga wuwo,
Nkozesa by'oyagala, Sikyali ku bwange;
Bulijjo nettanira (O)kulu'ngamizibwa,
N'okulongoosebwa Ggwe, Mu mutima gwange.

Naye kannewombeeke, Mu biseera byonna,
Nga nnind(a) okuteesa kwo, Ggwe nga bw'oyagala;
Fug(a) obulamu bwange, Yesu Ggwe Kabaka,
Ggwe amagezi gange, Mu byonna bye nkola.

Mukama onsembeze gy'oli, Eyo gyenjagala;
Okubeera mu kifuba kyo, Mpummulire mu Ggwe.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nse – mbe - za n'okwagala, O – ntu - se eyo gy'oli,
(Yesu nsembeza n'okwa-ga-la, Ntuuke, ontuuse eyo gy'oli)
O – nse - mbe - ze mu ki fuba kyo.
(Nsembeza n'okwagala, Ontuuse eyo gy'oli, Mbeere mu kifuba kyo)

Yesu Mukama ntuusa gy'oli, Mbeere wamu naawe,
Nga onkutte mu mikono gyo, Mu ssany(u) ejjereere.

Ontwale n'amaanyi g'Omwoyo, Ndyoke nkufanane;
Nzukiza, nnaaza, onnongoose, Nzigwemu ekibi.

Oyagal(a) obe wa Yesu akulongose? Wetaag(a) otambule mu kubbo lye?
Oyagala yetikkenga obuzibu bwo? Mugany(e) akulu'ngamye!

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Amaanyi ge ganakulongoosa; (O)musaayi gwe gunaakutukuza;
Bw'anakujjuza okwagala kwe, Onosanyuka ng'akulu'ngamya!

Oyagala akutuuse ku ddembe ddala? Osobole okumugoberera?
Oyagala onywezebwe mu mikono gye? Mugany(e) akulu'ngamye!

Oyagala akutuuse mu kiwummulo? Oyagala obeer (e) omuwanguzi?
Era oleetenga bangi abakungulwa? Mugany(e) akulu'ngamye!

Buli kigambo ekibi mmwe temukyogeranga,
Ziyiza omutima gwo, o~kuumeng(a) akamwa ko.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mwagalane~nga Bwagamba Ye~su
(Twagala-ne, Twagala-ne)
Tugondere etteeka ekkulu;
Mwagalane~nga Bwagamba Ye~su.
(Twagala-ne, Twagala-ne)
Tugondere etteeka lye.

Okwagala kutukuvu, Omukwano mulungi,
Empisa ey'obukyayi, Ya~ Setaan(i) omulabe.

Ebigambo by'obusungu, Ne bwebyogerw(a) empola;
Bizikiriza essanyu, Mu~ nkolagana zaffe.

Annung'amya, kinsanyusa! Kigambo kimpa~ amaanyi!
Buli kyenkola, gyembeera, (O)mu~kono gwe~ gu~nu~ng'amya.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Annung'amya, annung'~amya, (O)mukono gwe~gunnung'amya;
Ka mmwesige ngobere~re, Kubanga Ye~ a~nnu-ng'amya.

Bwe mbeera mu nnaku ennyingi, Oba bwembeera~ mu ssanyu;
Mu ddembe oba mu kabi, (O)mu~kono gwe~ gu~nu-ng'amya.

Mukama nnywez(a) omukono, Sigenda kwemmu~lugunya;
Mbeera mumativu wonna, Ku~banga Ggwe~ o~nu-ng'amya.

Mwendimala omulimu, Mu kisa kyo nga~ mpangudde;
Okufa nze sirikutya, Ku~banga Ggwe~ o~nu-ng'amya.

Ka nkusemberere (O)mulokozi!
Oba musaalaba, Ka~ ngwetikke!
Oluyimba lwange, Kusemberera Ggwe;
Ka nkusemberere, (O)mu~lokozi.

Ng'emmomboze kunsi, Buwungedde,
Sirina wendaba Kiwummulo;
Okusaba kwange, Ku kusemberera
Ka nkusemberere, (O)mu~lokozi.

Ondag(e) ekkubo lyo, Mbeere omwo,
Yonna gy'onoontwala, Mp(a) e~kisa kyo;
Mu ntambula yange, Nkusemberenga,
Ka nkusemberere, (O)mu~lokozi.

Ku nkya nga nzuukuse, Nkuyimbire;
Mu bizibu byange, Nte~ndereze,
Nkusemberere nnyo, Mu mbeer(a) ey'ennaku,
Ka nkusemberere, (O)mu~lokozi.

Bw'olijj(a) okuntwala, Eyo gy'oli;
Ndiyita mu bbanga, Nga~nsanyuka,
Oluyimba lwange, Kukusemberera,
Ka nkusemberere, (O)mu~lokozi.

title: Kye Ndowooza Kyokka
first_line: Kye ndowoza~ kyokka, Ge maka mu~ ggulu,

verses.lines:
Kye ndowoza~ kyokka, Ge maka mu~ ggulu,
Neyongedd(e) o~kusembera, Nnaate~r(a) okutuuka.

verses.label: Chorus

verses.lines:
Nsemberedd(e) e~waffe, Mu mayumb(a) a~mangi,
Eyo Yesu~ gy'afugira, Ku nnya~nja ennungi.

Bwe ndituka~ eyo, Ndyetikkula~ byonna,
Ennaku ndi~gyerabira, Ndyamba~la engule.

title: Netaaga Omulokozi
first_line: Netaaga Omulokozi, Kuba nze ndi munafu;

verses.lines:
Netaaga Omulokozi, Kuba nze ndi munafu;
Netaga okuba naye, Ng'ankutte ku mukono.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mu byonna nnaagumanga, Antwale gyayagala,
Nnaagenda seemulugunya, Bwenkulemberwa Yesu.

Netaaga Omulokozi, Siyinza kuwangula,
Wabula ye bw'anang'umya, Neddoboozi ly(e) eddungi.

Netaaga Omulokozi, Mu kutambula kwange,
Mu buzibu bwange bwonna, N'ebikemo by'omubi.

Netaaga Omulokozi, Andagenga ekkubo,
Amponye mu ntalo zange, N'okuwangula byonna.

title: Mu Lugendo Lwange
first_line: Mu lugendo lwange lwonna, Yesu ankulembera;

verses.lines:
Mu lugendo lwange lwonna, Yesu ankulembera;
Nyinza ntya (o)kubusabusa, Ye bw'antwala bulijjo?
Byonna ebibeera mu nze Tebiyinza kunnumya,
[Yesu ye Mukuumi wange, Y'angabira (o)bulamu.]x2

Mu lugendo lwange lwonna, Yesu ankulembera,
Era ne bwe mba nga nkoye, Ampozawoza mangu;
Enyonta ng(a) ennuma ennyo, Ng'enkalamat(a) enzita,
[Oyo lwe Lwazi omuva, Amazzi g'obulamu.]x2

Katonda Omu~tu~kuvu, Nnu'ngamya nga ntambula!
Ndi munafu, Ggwe~ o~lina amaanyi ge~ netaaga;
Mpanirira, Nywereza nze, Mu mukon (o) ogw'amaanyi,
Mu muko~n(o) o~gw'amaanyi.

Gulaw(o) ensulo~ (e)y'a~mazzi, Etukuz(e) abaana bo,
Giggulire entukuze, Okummalam(u) ekibi.
Gwe empagi y'omuliro, Beera engabo yange,
Beera e~nga~bo yange.

Bwe ndituuka ku~ mba~lama Z'omugga Yoludaani,
Okutya kwange~ ku~ggwewo, Ontuse mu~ Kanaani!
Neyonger(e) ennaku zonna, (O)kukutenderezanga,
(O)kukute~nde~rezanga.

title: Kabaka Ali Ku Luggi
first_line: Kabaka ali ku luggi, Eyafa ku lwa (a)bonoonyi

verses.lines:
Kabaka ali ku luggi, Eyafa ku lwa (a)bonoonyi
Ajjidde mu kitiibwa kye, Atutwale eka.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ku luggi, Ku luggi; Yesu ali kumpi ku luggi,
Yesu ajja, Tumulinde, Ali kumpi ku luggi.

(O)bubonero bw'okuddakwe, Butuukirira mangu nyo;
Mangu nnyo tulimulaba, Lw'alidda n'amaanyi.

Temunoonya ssanyu lya nsi, N'ekitiibwa n'emirembe,
Yesu yaggyawo ekibi, Tuwummule mu Ye.

Nga tutuuse mu nsi empya, Abatukuvu be bonna,
Tulitikkirwa engule, Mu maaso g'Yesu.

title: Kiseera Ki Ekisigadde?
first_line: Kiseera ki (e)kisi~gadde, Tutuke mu maka gaffe?

verses.lines:
Kiseera ki (e)kisi~gadde, Tutuke mu maka gaffe?
Ekiro kyonna ki~ggwawo Enkya esembera.
Totya naye dduka mangu Laba emmambya esala
Tunaatera oku~tuka (E)kiro gye kitaba.

Mbuza mulwanyi mu~nange, Naye nanziramu bwati,
"Ggwe nyweza nnyo eki~tala (O)lutalo terulwe.
Kale totya, naye guma, Omal(e) omulimu gwonna;
Lab(a) olutalo bwe~ luggwa, Tulifun(a) engule."

Mbuuz(a) ebitond(e) eby'o~mu nsi, Nebigambira wamu nti.
"Ebiro biri ku~mpi nnyo, Ensi empya ejje.
Kale guma nnyo tokaaba, Bingi biraga ebiro;
Buli kitonde ki~rinze (O)kuvuga kwe'ngombe."

Kiseera ssi kine~ne nnyo, (O)mutambuze asanyuke
Ennaku ze nga zi~wedde (A) maziga gaggwewo.
Kale sanyuka nnyo nnyini, Tuli kumpi okutuka,
Tube n'essanyu bu~lijjo Mu nju ya Kitaffe.

title: Kya Ssanyu Omutambuze
first_line: Kya ssanyu omutambuze okuwulira Ng'ali ewala mu malungu,

verses.lines:
