Kya ssanyu omutambuze okuwulira Ng'ali ewala mu malungu,
Nti "Omununuzi anaatera okujja, Akutuuse mu ns(i) ensuubize."

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Alijja! Mmanyi~ nti Yesu ajja,- - - Akomawo ku nsi kuno.
Naffe aba - - -na be - - - Abakooy(e) ennyo,
Tulifuga~ ne Ye~su.

Entana z'abantu baffe bonna abaafa, Ziribikkuka zonna lumu;
Abantu be bonna abeebaka mu kufa, Balivaayo mu ntaana zaabwe.

Tunaabanga wamu fenna mu mirembe gye, Nga tuyimba n'essanyu lingi;
Abanunule be baliva mu nsi yonna, Okusinza Kabaka Yesu.

Aleruya, ye wewawo, Aleruya nnyo! Bwe tuba mu ye tulituuka;
Tunyiikire okutuusa lw'alikomawo, Tuweebw(e) engule z'obulamu.

Abatukuvu mulabe, Eggulu nga likankana,
Ettabaaza zammwe zaake, Mweteeketeeke Yes(u) ajja.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Alijja! Ye-su ajja! - - - Ajja mu kitiibw(a) ekingi
Ng'Omuwanguzi afuge, Alijja, Yesu ajja! - - -

Laba ekisuubizo kye, (E)bibi byo byasonyiyibwa,
Olindiriddwa engule, Yanguwa buulir(a) enjiri.

Obwakabaka buggwawo, Okudda kwe kusembera;
Buulir(a) ekisa ky(e) ekingi, (E)kkondeere terinnavuga.

Amawanga ganafuwa, (O)bwakabaka bwe bwanguwa;
(O)kubonaabona kukome, Mwogere nti Yesu azze!

(O)mwonoonyi Yes(u) akuyita, Kakaan(o) akuwolereza;
Jjangu nga tebunayita, Ayogere nti, "Kiwedde!"

title: Laya Eng'oma, Tegeeza
first_line: Laya e'ngoma tegeeza wonna, Yesu alijja mangu!

verses.lines:
Laya e'ngoma tegeeza wonna, Yesu alijja mangu!
Musanyuke mmwe abatambuze, Yesu alijja mangu!

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines: Akomawo, akomawo, Yes(u) akomawo nate!

Bunya kino mu mawanga gonna, Yesu alijja mangu;
Ajja kujja mu kitiibwa kingi, Yesu alijja mangu.

Yimus(a) eddoboozi mu nsi zonna, Yesu alija mangu!
Entalo n'obusungu mu bantu, Yesu alijja mangu.

(A)magezi geyongedde mu bantu, Yesu alijja mangu;
Enjala era n'ebikankano, Yesu alijja mangu.

Enjiri ebuna mangu mu nsi, Yesu alijja mangu;
Ebyo byonna bitulaga ffe nti, Yesu ajja mangu nnyo.

title: Essuubi Lya Ssanyu
first_line: Essuu~bi lya~ ssanyu, Lye tu~lina~ ffenna,

verses.lines:
Essuu~bi lya~ ssanyu, Lye tu~lina~ ffenna,
Lisi~nga e~ssanyu~ ly'ensi,~ Eri~ggwaw (o) a~mangu.

Tuli~n(a) emmu~nyeenye, Emu~lisa~ wonna,
Ema~lawo~ enzi~kiza,~ Y'eki~bi n'e~ntaana.

(E)ddoboo~zi we~ liri, Lyoge~ra bu~lungi,
Nti "Ka~tonda~ akwa~gala,~ Totya~ gum(a) o~mwoyo."

(O)kuva~ Golo~gosa, Evaa~y(o) eddo~boozi,
Eri~rangi~rira~ ggwe nti,~ "Aso~nyiy(e) e~bibi."

Oba ekiseera kirituuka ku kya - - -
Okumasamasa kwe ne kulabika;- - -
Yesu ng'ajja n'ekitiibwa ekinene
Okututwala e~wuwe.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ayi Mukama, Olijja ddi?
Tulab(e) amaaso go!
Yesu ajja, Aleruya,
Aleruya! Amiina.
Aleruya! Amiina.

Buliba mu ttuntu ob(a) eyo mu ttumbi,- - -
Tuliba tul(i) awo ng'ensi yonna, yonna; - - -
Efuuka omusana ogwaka ennyo,
Mukama ng'atuddu~kidde.

Bamalayika nga bayimba n'esssanyu, - - -
Era n'abanunule be bonna wamu - - -
Nekitiibwa kye ekyakayakan(a) ennyo,
Mukama bw'alijja~ bw'atyo.

Tuligenda n'essanyu eteri kufa, - - -
Teri ndwadde, Teri nnaku, teri ntiisa;- - -
Tuliyita mu bire wamu ne Yesu,
Ng'atutwala ffe e~wuwe.

O~lunaku olulungi lujja, Yesu lw'alijja;
O~kutwala abaana be fenna, Mu maka gaffe.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
(E)kitiibw(a) ekimasamasa N'amaanyi eby'ekitalo ennyo!
Birigoba enzikiza, Entaana ziribikkuka.

E~njiri ye egenda ebuna, Mu buli ggwanga,
Ye~su alyoke ajje mangu nnyo, (E)ngombe ng'evuze.

A~najja ne bamalayika be, Ng'amasamasa,
Ye~su ajja okututwala ffe, Eteri kufa.

A~bantu mu nsi bonna abaafa, Tulibalaba,
E~ra (a)maziga gaffe gonna, Agasangule.

Yesu yasuubiza abakkiriza,
Nti "Ndikomawo ne nembatwala gyendi;
Mutunule nga munnindirira,
(O)kutuusa lwe ndijja, mwe munywerenga."

verses.label: Chorus

verses.lines:
Essuubi lyaffe mu kigambo kye -
Kwekukomawo kwa Yesu kuns(i) eno
Kyekisinga byonna obukulu,
Ffe ka tunywerenga, Alijja mangu.

Yesu ajja (o)kulongosa (E)bintu byonna by'ensi!
(A)maggwa~ go~nna~ ag'e~ki~bi~, Go tegalidda~yo,
O~kuzisa e~nsi, (E) ki~ko~limo~ kiriggwaawo.

title: Yesu Mukama Omulokozi
first_line: Yesu Mukama Omulokozi, Yajja mu nsi okunoony(a) ababi;

verses.lines:
Yesu Mukama Omulokozi, Yajja mu nsi okunoony(a) ababi;
Nga kwa kitalo okwagala kwe, Yajj(a) okunoonya nze.
Yajj(a) okunoonya nze, Yajj(a) okunoonya nze.
Nga kwa kitalo okwagala kwe, Yajj(a) okunoonya nze.

Yesu Mukama Omulokozi, Bwe nali mu nvuba ya Setani,
Yannunula n'omusaayi gwe ye, Yesu yanfiirira.
Yesu yanfiirira, Yesu yanfiirira.
Yannunula n'omusaayi gwe ye, Yesu yanfiirira.

Yesu Mukama Omulokozi, Bwe nali nga nvudde mu kkubo lye,
Yankowoola n'okusaasira kwe, Yesu yampita nze.
Yesu yampita nze, Yesu yampita nze.
Yankowoola n'okusaasira kwe, Yesu yampita nze.

Yesu Mukama Omulokozi, (E)kigambo kino kye kinsanyusa,
Ndimulaba lw'alijja n'ebire, Okuntwal(a) ewuwe.
Okuntwal(a) ewuwe, Okuntwal(a) ewuwe.
Ndimulaba lw'alijja n'ebire, Okuntwal(a) ewuwe.

title: Nga Bayita Amannya Gaffe
first_line: Bwe bafuuw(a) eng'ombe ya Yesu ng'ajjira ku bire

verses.lines:
Bwe bafuuw(a) eng'ombe ya Yesu ng'ajjira ku bire
Ku lunaku olw(o) olw'ekitalo ennyo;
Abatukuvu abali mu nsi bwe bakung'ana,
Nga bayita amannya nange ndibaawo!

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
[Nga bayi – t(a) amannya ga – ffe,]x3
(Nga bayit(a) amannya gaffe mu ggulu)x2
Nga bayit(a) amannya ga-ffe)
Nga bayit(a) amannya nange ndibaawo.

Tuliraba abafu mu Kristo nga bazuukira,
Baliweebw(a) ekitiibwa kya Katonda;
Abalonde be bwe balikungaanira mu ggulu,
Nga bayita (a)mannya nange ndibaawo.

Ka tukolere Mukama buli kiseera kyonna,
Ka tubuulire abantu ku Yesu;
(O)mulimu gwe nga guwedde nga azz(e) okutunona,
Nga bayita (a)mannya nange ndibaawo.

title: Yesu Alikungaanya Abantu
first_line: Yesu aliku'nganya aba~ntu (O)kulabika mu maaso ge;

verses.lines:
Yesu aliku'nganya aba~ntu (O)kulabika mu maaso ge;
Ffe tuliba tutya musa~ngo, Bw'alituyit(a) okuwoza?

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Aliteek(a) e'ngano mu ggwani~ka, Alisuul(a) ebisu~su~nku;
Tu~liba tutya mu musa~ngo Ku lunaku olukulu?

Tulimuwulira ng'aga~mba, "Muddu omwesigwa weebale?"
Oba ffe tulitya n'obulu~mi, Nga tugobwa mu maaso ge?

Alisanyukira abaana~ be, Ng'alaba be yanunula;
Alibambaza eby'omu ggu~lu, Balifukamira w'ali.

Ka tutunule ffe twekume~nga, Ettabaza nga zaaka nyo;
Awasa omugole bw'ali~jja, Twetegeke okugenda.

Ka tulowooze eby'omu ggu~lu, Tulindirir(e) ekiseera;
(O)lugendo lwaffe bwerulikoma, Tulibeera mu maaso ge.

Sitwalibwa bugagga feeza oba zaabu,
Njagala bya mu ggulu N'okutuuka gy'oli;
Mu kitabo kyo Yesu Omuli amannya,
Mbulirako, Mukama, Mulimu eryange?

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mu kitabo omwo omuli amannya,
Ontegeeze, Mukama, mulimu eryange?

Ebibi byange bingi Binzitowerera,
Naye omusayi gwo Tegulemwa kibi,
Yesu Ggwe wasuubiza Mu Byawandikibwa
Ebibi byaffe byonna, (O)kubifuul(a) ebyeru.

Mu kibuga kyo Yesu, Kye watekateeka,
N'ekitiibwa ekingi Ekimasamasa,
Ekibi gye kitajja, Kwonoona baana bo,
Okuli abakuumi, Nange wampandiika?

Ekiseera (e)ky'omusango kituuse, Ebitabo bibikkuddwa;
Tuliba tutya mu~ maaso ge, Ka~tond(a) O~mulamuzi?

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Tuliyimirira~ tutya? Ku lunaku olu~kulu?
(A)wamu n'ebibi bya~ffe byonna, - - -
O~banga~ bisanguddwa?

Omusango gwatandika n'abafu, Naffe kati tukeberwa;
Ebitabo by'oku~jjukiza, Bi~rike~berwa ddala.

Tuliba tutya mu kaseer(a) ako, Ng(a) ebibi byaffe birabwa?
Omusango nga gu~saliddwa, Te~riba~ kujulira.

Omusayi gwa Yesu gwe gunaaza, Ebibi byaffe bingi nnyo;
Tetulina nsonga~ okutya, Ye~ ng(a) atu~wolereza.

title: Ffe Twayitibwa Ku Mbaga
first_line: Ffe twayitibwa ku mbaga ye, Tutuule wamu n'abantu be,

verses.lines:
Ffe twayitibwa ku mbaga ye, Tutuule wamu n'abantu be,
Kale nno tulibeera tutya, Kabaka ng'azze?

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Kale ow'o~luganda, Yesu~ lw'alijja,
Olibeera ku ludda ki, Kabaka ng'azze?

Ng'atikidd(e) engule ku mutwe, N'ekitiibw(a) oyo eyattibwa,
Entiisa eribaawo nnene, Kabaka ng'azze.

Alijja wamu n'okumyansa, Byonna bye tukisa abantu;
Birimanyibwa buli muntu, Kabaka ng'azze.

Alisanyukira ababe, Abaliba mu ngoy(e) enjeru;
Tugume tuwangule byonna, Kabaka ng'azze.

Mukama otuwe ekisa, Fenna tukulindirirenga;
Tusanyuke okukulaba, Bw'onooba ng'ozze.

title: Tetumanyi Ssaawa
first_line: Tetumanyi ssaawa ya kudda kwa Yesu;

verses.lines:
Tetumanyi ssaawa ya kudda kwa Yesu; Nay(e) obubonero bulaga etuuse!
Yes(u) akomewo, nga bweyatusuubiza – Tetumanyi ssaawa.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Alijja – Tutunule twetegeke: Alijja - Aleruya, Yesu ajja!
Ajjira mu bire, mu kitiibw(a) eky'eggulu – Tetumanyi ssaawa.

Ffe abaana be yatuwa omusana, Omusana ogwo guli mu Kigambo;
Obunabbi butulaga ali kumpi – Tetumanyi ssaawa.

Ka tutunule twasenga ettabaaza, Ka tukole nnyo nga tulind(a) okujja kwe;
Tulisanyuka, tuyimbe olw'essanyu – Tetumanyi ssaawa.

title: Tetumanyi Ssaawa Lw'alijja
first_line: Tetumanyi ssaawa lw'alijja, Mu ttuntu oba mu ttumbi,

verses.lines:
Tetumanyi ssaawa lw'alijja, Mu ttuntu oba mu ttumbi,
Ku makya oba kawungezi, Atugamba tutunule!
Twetegekere okudda kwe, (E)ttabaza zaffe nga zaaka,
Lw'alidd(a) alyok(e) atusange ffe, Nga tumulindirira nnyo.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nga tutunula,
Nga, tumulinze;
Nga tutunula,
(Nga tutunula nga tulinda Ye) x3
Nga tulindirira Yesu.

Yesu Omununuzi wange, Omanyi nga nze nkwagala,
Era nsuubir(a) okukulaba, Mpulire eddoboozi lyo;
Bw'olijja nga Omulamuzi, Nga abamu bakudduka,
Nze ndikwaniriz(a) Omwagalwa, N'essanyu mu ssaawa eyo.

(O)mulokozi ndimulaba, Ddala kiriba kitya!
Bwe ndirabagana n'oyo, Yesu eyanfiirira?

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ndimulaba mu kitiibwa, Bw'alijjira ku bire;
(A)maaso n'amaaso Mukama, Ndimulaba yennyini!

Siyinza okumulaba Olw'enzikiza y'ensi;
Naye olunaku lujja, Ndabe ekitiibwa kye!

Tulijaguza nnyo nnyini, (E)nnaku nga ziweddewo;
Ensobi nga zigoloddwa, Tulibeera mu ddembe;

Tuliba basayufu nnyo, Okumutunulako,
Yesu (O)mununuzi waffe, Kri-sto atwagal(a) ennyo!

title: Mu Kibuga kya Katonda
first_line: Mu kibuga kya Katonda, Okuva mu ntebe ye,~

verses.lines:
Mu kibuga kya Katonda, Okuva mu ntebe ye,~
Waliw(o) omugga (o)mulungi Oguleet(a) o~bula~mu.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Tuliku'ngana ku mugga,
Ogwo gwetulisanyuki~ra-ko;
Fenna twagala~ okutuu - ka
Ku mugga gw'obula~mu.

Yesu Omusumba waffe Anatulu'ngamyanga,~
Mu ddundiro ly'okwesiima, Kumpi n'omu~gga gu~li.

Naye nga tetunnatuuka Awaal(i) omugga guli,~
Otutikkul(e) emigugu Egy'ennak(u) e~nnying(i) e~nnyo.

Olugendo lwaffe luno Lwa nnaku si nnyingi nnyo,~
Ffe tetulirwa kutuuka Okwetaba~ ne Ye~su.

title: Bwe Ndimala Omulimu
first_line: Bwe ndimal(a) omulimu ku nsi, Nentuuka gy'ali,

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nze ndimu—tegeera Yesu, Nga nnyimiridde ku~mpi naye;
Nze ndimu—tegeera Yesu, Olw'enkovu z'emi~sumaali.

Be twagala bwe batuvaako, tuin(a) essuubi,
Nga tubasibuula tujjukira nti:
Mu ggulu tulibalaba, (a)watali kabi, Okusooka netaaga ndabe Yesu.

title: Bwe Mbeera Ku Yoludaani
first_line: Bwe~ mbeera ku Yoludaani, Nnengera n'essa~nyu;

verses.lines:
Bwe~ mbeera ku Yoludaani, Nnengera n'essa~nyu;
Ka~naani yaffe ennungi, Mu butaka~ bwa~ffe.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Tuliwu-mmula mu nsi ennungi (ennungi),
Nga tuma-ze okusomo-ka~~(ensi);
Tuyimb(e) o-luyimb(a) olw'Omwana (gw'Endiga),
Tubeere naye bulijjo.

E~mitala w'enseny(i) ezo, Butangaavu bwo~kka;
Bwe~ bwakabaka bwa Yesu, Agoba e~ki~ro.

Ne~gomba okutuukayo, Nsanyuke buli~jjo;
Ntu~nulenga ku Kitaffe, Mu bwakaba~ka~ bwe.

Nni~na essanyu mu mwoyo, Wano nze sirwee~wo,
Wa~dde ebizibu bingi, Ka ng'ume ndi~ge~nda.

title: Nga Tumaze Omulimu
first_line: Nga tumaz(e) omulimu ku nsi, (A)bakunguzi tuligenda;

verses.lines:
Nga tumaz(e) omulimu ku nsi, (A)bakunguzi tuligenda;
Awamu n'ebikungulwa, Mu kibuga ekiggya.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
(E)ssanyu~ eyo lubeerera,
(Essanyu~ lubereera)
(E)ssanyu~ erita-liggwaawo,
(Essanyu~ teriggwaawo)
O-lu~naku lusembedde, tuku'nga-nire eka.

Tuliyimb(a) ennyimb(a) ez'essanyu, Nga tumwebaza Mukama;
Kristo Yesu nga Kabaka, Mu kibuga ekiggya.

Essanyu lingi litulinze, Mu nju ezakolwa zaabu;
Yesu zeyateekateeka, Mu kibuga ekiggya.

Waliwo ensi ennungi nnyo, (O)lw'okukkiriza tugiraba;
Mukama atulindiridde, Okutusembeza ffe gy'ali.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mu ssanyu jjereere, Tulisisinkana mu ggulu;
Mu ssanyu jjereere, Tulibeera n'Omulokozi.

Mu nsi eyo tunaayimbanga: Ennyimba z'essanyu eringi,
Eyo tewaliba kukaaba, Tulibeera mu ddembe lyokka.

Eyo Kitaff(e) ow'omu ggulu, Tunasuutang(a) obulungi bwe,
Olw'ekirabo ky'okwagala, Era n'emikisa gyatuwa.

title: Ndibeera Ku Mugga
first_line: Ndibeera ku mugg(a) omulamu, Ensul(o) ey'obuwa;

verses.lines:
Ndibeera ku mugg(a) omulamu, Ensul(o) ey'obuwa;
Eyo Yesu gy'atulinze ffe, Okutwaniriza.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Tulibeera ku mugga o-gwo, Ogw'amazzi amala-mu;
[Tulibeera ku mugg(a) ogw'omuggulu; Ogw'amazzi agaw(a) obulamu]
Tubeere ku mugga o-gwo, Ensul(o) ey'obulamu.
[Tubeere ku mugg(a) ogwo bulijjo]

Abakooye olw'olugendo, Tuliwummulako;
Ku mazzi agamasamasa, Agaleet(a) essanyu.

Yesu ge mazzi amalamu, Nnywa oddem(u) amaanyi;
Jjang(u) ofune obulokozi, Owon(e) ennyonta yo.

Mu nsi y'abanunule, Yeri ekibuga;
Mukama kye yazimba, Era teri kiro.

verses.label: Chorus

verses.lines:
Emiryango gya luulu, Mu kibuga ekyo;
(E)nguudo zonna za zaabu, Era teri kiro.

(E)nzigi teziggalwenga, Mu kibuga ekyo;
(O)bulamu tebuggwaawo, Era teri kiro.

(E)njuba teyetaagibwa, Mu kibuga ekyo;
Yesu musana gwakyo, Era teri kiro.

title: Essanyu n'Eddembe
first_line: Essanyu n'eddembe tulifuna, Essanyu n'eddembe tulifuna,

verses.lines:
Essanyu n'eddembe tulifuna, Essanyu n'eddembe tulifuna,
Essanyu n'eddembe tulifuna, Yesu bw'alikomawo.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ng'azz(e) atutwa~l(e)ka, A~baagalwa be fenna;
Tuliba mu ssanyu Yesu ng'azze, Okututwala eka.

Tewaliba nnaku Yesu ng'azze, Tewaliba nnaku Yesu ng'azze;
Tewaliba nnaku Yesu ng'azze Okututwala eka.

Teriba maziga mu nsi eyo, Teriba maziga mu nsi eyo
Teriba maziga mu nsi eyo, Yesu bw'alikomawo.

Tuliyimba nnyimba za kusuuta, Tuliyimba nnyimba za kusuuta,
Tuliyimba nnyimba za kusuuta, Yesu bw'alikomawo.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
(O)kwagala mu maka,
Liba ssanyu jjerere,
Mu maka gaffe.

Mu nju libeera ssanyu, Olw'okwagala,
Mu ggulu basanyuka, Olwokwagala;
Wonna wonna mu nnyumba,
Nga wajjudde essanyu,
(O)bulamu busanyusa, Mu maka gaffe.

Yesu nfuula owuwo, Mbe n'okwagala,
Er(a) olwa saddaka yo, nfuula omuggya:
Ggwe omponye mu bubi,
Ompummulize mu Ggwe,
Ompe omukisa gwo, Mu maka gaffe.

Ggwe Okwagala, Okusukkiridde,
Tufukamidde nga tukusaba,
Obaw(e) okwagal(a) okutakoma,
Abagole boogass(e) olwa leero.

Baw(e) obulamu obutuukiridde,
Obw'okwagala n'okukkiriza;
Bawe essuubi, Bagumiikirize,
N'obwesige Obutatya kabi.

Bawe essanyu, Mu nnaku ey'ensi,
Baw(e) emirembe, Mu buli mbeera;
Enkya ennungi, Bagisuubirenga,
Nti lumu olidd(a) okubanona.

Mujje, nga mweterereka
Mu maaso ga Yesu;
Okwagala kwe kujjuze
(E)myoyo gyammwe

Wulira ggw(e) alindirira
(O)mugolewo leero,
Mu kwagal(a) okutaggwawo
Mugattibwe.

Naawe akkirizza wano
Okumufumbirwa,
Laba Kitaffe awulira
(O)bweyamo bwo!

Nammwe ababetoolodde,
Okubasabira,
Katonda waff(e) akakasa
(E)birayiro.

Mujje nga mweterereka:
Mukama waffe ajja,
Okutusembeza gyali,
Mugolewe.

Bwe mutyo mweterereke:
Agabire bonna
Omwoyo Omutukuvu
Abasaba.

title: Tetulyawukana
first_line: Bwe tuba ku nsi ne banaffe (E)kiseera kitono,

verses.lines:
Bwe tuba ku nsi ne banaffe (E)kiseera kitono,
Tuba n'ennaku nnyingi nnyo ffe, Nga tubasiibula.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Tewali kufa mu ggulu, Teri kwawukana;
Mu nsi eyo ey'essanyu, Tetulyawukana.

Essuubi eryo nga ddungi nnyo Nga tubasiibula,
Bwe tujjukira essubi nti, Tunaabanga nabo!

Tewaliba kusiibula, Mu maka gaffe ago;
Naye liriba ssanyu lyokka, Emirembe gyonna.

Abeebakira mu Yesu, Balizuukirir(a) essanyu;
Balibeera mu mirembe, Okufa nga kuwanguddwa.

Abeebakira mu Yesu, Kwe kwebaka okw'essuubi;
(O)kuwummula kw'obwesige, Mu ssuubi ery'omukisa.

Abeebakira mu Yesu, Balizuukuka mu ssanyu;
Tebalikwatibwa ntiisa, Ku kulabika kwa Yesu.

Abeebakira mu Yesu, Banaater(a) okuzuukuka;
Ekkondeere nga livuze, Balizuukir(a) obutafa.

Ku musalaba nnengera (E)nsuulo y'obulamu:
Mukama Omulokozi Ndab(e) ebiwundu byo,

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mu mugga gw'obulokozi Ka nnabemu ntukuzibwe;
Yesu yebal(e) antukuza, Antukuza n'omusaayi.

Nze nfuuka kitonde kiggya, Olw'omusaayi gwe;
Eby'edda byonna biggwawo, Olw'amaanyi ge ye.

Ka ntambule mu maanyi ge, Setaani tannyinze;
Ebibi byonna bigende, Yesu andokole.

Olw'omusaayi gwa Yesu, Ensi tekyanfuga:
Yesu Mukama yamponya, Oyo eyattibwa.

Tufukeko (O)mwoyo (O)mutukuvu
Ajje ku ffe leero atuzze buggya.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Tukusaba, Yes(u) emitima gyaffe,
O~gizze obuggya - - Olw'ekisa kyo.

Ffen(a) abalin(a) ebibi, tunaaze,
Tufuuke abantu abaggya leero.

Jjangu Omwoyo Omutukuvu,
Kka ku ffe nga bwe wakka ku Mukama.

Ka tuwulire eddoboozi lye,
"Ggwe mwana wange gwe njagala ennyo."

verses.label: Doxology
verses.lines:
Tukwebaza Ggwe, Omwana gw'Endiga,
Lee~ro tubatize, - - Buggya - Amiina.

Ka mpummulirenga wano,
Okumpi ne Yesu,
Ensonga y'essuubi lyange,
Yesu yanfiirira.

Omulokozi eyafa,
Ensulo ennaaza;
Okummalako ekibi,
Nnaaza mu musaayi.

Ntukuza mbere owuwo,
Si bigere byokka;
Naye nnaaza n'emikono,
(O)mutwe n'omutima.

Ssaddaaka y'omusaayi gwo,
Ennongoose nzenna;
Okutuusa lwe ndiraba
Gwennakkiriz(a) Oyo.

Wuliriza Omusumba, Ayita endig(a) eziri;
Mu ddungu ly'ekizikiza Gye zawabira obw'edda.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Gendayo, (o)zireete, Oziggye~ mu ns(i) ey'ekibi;
Gendayo, (o)zireete, Mu kisi~bo kya Ye-su.

Anamubeera ye ani, Okunoonya ezibuze,
Okuzizza mu kisibo, Mwe zibeera obulungi?

Zikaabira mu malungu, Era ne ku nsozi zonna,
Mukama ye akugamba, "Ggwe, noonya endiga zange."

Bwalijja Mukama waffe, Okutwala gy'ali
Abamulindiriranga, Abamwagala.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ng'emmunyeny(e) ez'omu bbanga Bwe~ zaaka waggulu,
N'abo bwe balibeera, Abagalwa be.

Aliku'nganyiza w'ali Abaana be bonna,
Abanyikira nnyo wano, (O)kumufanana.

Abakopi n'abakulu Abagala Yesu,
Baliweebw(a) empeera yaabwe, Bw'alikomawo.

Abaana abamwagala, Alibalokola;
Ng(a) amayinj(a) ag'omuwendo omungi ennyo.

title: Ai Katonda Atutuusizza
first_line: Ayi Katond(a) atutuusizza, Ku lunaku olw'essanyu;

verses.lines:
Ayi Katond(a) atutuusizza, Ku lunaku olw'essanyu;
Kkiriz(a) okwebaza kwaffe, Wamu n'oku~saba kwaffe.

Tukugulumiza leero, Olw'ennyumba eno empya;
Tulungamizenga muno, Mu kkub(o) eri~tuuka gy'oli.

Abaazimb(a) ekkanis(a) eno, Obaweng(a) emikisa gyo,
Bonn(a) abakulu n'abato, Bamanye o~kwagala kwo.

Katulab(e) ekitiibwa kyo, Mu yekaalu y(o) entukuvu;
Kubang(a) obulungi bwayo, Tebugasa~ nga toliimu.

Bwetukung'anirangamu, Netukuw(a) emyoyo gyaffe;
(O)buyinza bw'amazima go, Bwerag(e) er(a) o~tuwulire.

(E)kitiibwa ky(o) ekitaggwawo, Kibenga mu Kanisa yo;
Ekulember(e) abantu bo, Okubatuu~sa mu ggulu.

title: Waliwo Omusaayi Ogw'amaanyi
first_line: Oyagal(a) osonyiyibw(e) ebibi? Mu musaayi gwe, Mwonaazibwa;

verses.lines:
Oyagal(a) osonyiyibw(e) ebibi? Mu musaayi gwe, Mwonaazibwa;
Oyagal(a) owangule ekibi? Omusaayi gwe gumala.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Waliw(o) omusaay(i) ogw'amaanyi, Oguva mu Yesu,
Waliw(o) omusaay(i) ogw'amaanyi
Gwa muwendo mungi nnyo.

Oyagal(a) ove mu by'amalala? Mu musaayi gwe, Mwonaazibwa;
Genda ku musaalab(a) onaazibwe, Omusaayi gwe gumala.

(O)kutukul(a) okusing(a) omuzira, Mu musaayi gwe, Mwonaazibwa;
Gusangul(a) amalala g'ekibi, Omusaayi gwe gumala.

Oyagal(a) owereze Mukama? Mu musaayi gwe, Mwonaazibwa;
Oyimbe nga bw'otenda Mukama? Omusaayi gwe gumala.

Tukola lwa kwagala, Kutuwa amaanyi.
Kutuw(a) ekisa ekingi Er(i) abantu bonna.

verses.label: Chorus

verses.lines:
Ensi ejjudde (e)nnaku, Endwadde n'ekibi;
Olw'okwagala tufuba, Kulw(a) abantu bonna.

Emitima gijjule Essanyu bulijjo,
Bwe tubeera n'okwagala (O)musana gwe gwaka.

Bwe tulituuka eri Ewaffe mu ggulu,
Ennyimba zaffe ziriba Ku kisa kya Yesu.

Nsanyukira ekigambo kino,
Yesu Mukama atwagala nnyo;
Birimu bingi ebinsanyusa,
Eky(o) ekisinga nti "Nze nkwagala."

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Anjagala, Ye anjagala, Kya kital(o) Okunjagala!
Anjagala olw'ekisa kye, Nang(e) era mwagala.

Bwemba nnyonoona ne mwerabira,
Yesu tandeka kubula ddala;
Ampita mangu (o)kumweyuna Ye,
Er(a) anjjijukiz(a) okwagala kwe.

Bwe nditunulir(a) ekitiibwa kye,
Ndiyimba ntya bwe siyimba bwentyo?
Nnyimba emirembe nemirembe,
Yesu kik(i) ekyakunjagaza nze?

title: Katonda Afaayo
first_line: Ba n'essuubi~ mu mutima, Katonda afaayo~;

verses.lines:
Ba n'essuubi~ mu mutima, Katonda afaayo~;
Akuwamba~tira leero, Katonda afaayo.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Katonda afaayo,
Yonna, yonna, gy'onogenda;
Afaayo nnyo~ gyoli, - - -
Katonda a~ - - faayo. [afaayo]

Mu bizibu~ byonn(a) ebyensi, Katonda afaayo~;
Mu bintu byo~nn(a) eby'entiisa, Katonda afaayo.

Byewetaaga~ (a)nabikuwa, Katonda afaayo~;
Addamu bo~nn(a) abasaba, Katonda afaayo.

Mu bikemo~ eby'entisa, Katonda afaayo~;
Wesige ye~ yekka totya, Katonda afaayo.

title: Tunaatera Okutuuka Eka
first_line: Leka tuyimbe oluyimb(a) olw'essanyu, Tunater(a) okutuuka eka,

verses.lines:
Leka tuyimbe oluyimb(a) olw'essanyu, Tunater(a) okutuuka eka,
(E)kiro kiggwewo (o)musana gwake wonna, Tunaatera(a) okutuuka eka.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Tuli kumpi nnyo, Tuli kumpi nnyo, Okusomok(a) ens(i) eno;
Tusisinkane ng'ebizibu bikomye, Tunaater(a) okutuuka eka.

Tulikol(a) emirimu nga tusanyuka, Tunaater(a) okutuuka eka.
Tulinywezebwa ekisa kya Katonda, Tunaater(a) okutuuka eka.

Tuyambe bonna abakooye mu kkubo, Tunaater(a) okutuuka eka.
Tubalage okwagala kwa Katonda, Tunaater(a) okutuuka eka.

Tuliwona ebizibu eby'ens(i) eno, Tunaater(a) okutuuka eka.
Teriba maziga mu kibuga ekyo, Tunaater(a) okutuuka eka.

title: Noonya Obubonero
first_line: Noony(a) obubonero ng'otambula, Noony(a) obubonero buve kumu;

verses.lines:
Noony(a) obubonero ng'otambula, Noony(a) obubonero buve kumu;
Okuva ku bwakabak(a) obuna, Tuli luddawa? - - - Noonya olabe.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Noonyerez(a) obubonero bw'obunnabbi,
Okuva ku bwakabak(a) obuna;
Noonyerez(a) obubonero bw'obunnabbi,
Tuli kumpi n'eka.

Okusook(a) Abasuuli baafuga; (A)bameedi n'Abaperusi nabo;
(A)bayonaani n'abo ne bafuga, Ruumi neddako - - - Tuli ludda wa?

Ebigere (e)by'ekyuma n'ebbumba, Binafu binater(a) okuggwaawo;
Kiki ekinaddirira ku nsi? Kudda kwa Yesu, - - N'ens(i) eteggwaawo.

title: Okuva Lweyajja Mu Nze
first_line: Nga nafun(a) Okukyusibwa mu bulamu, Okuva lweyajja mu nze!

verses.lines:
Nga nafun(a) Okukyusibwa mu bulamu, Okuva lweyajja mu nze!
Nin(a) ekitangaala kyendudde nga nnoonya, Okuva lweyajja mu nze.

verses.label: Chorus

verses.lines:
Nakoma okubulubuuta mu ns(i) eno; Okuva lwe yajja munze,
N'ebibi byange byonna byasangulibwa; Okuva lwe yajja mu nze.

Nnin(a) essuub(i) eddamu ery'olyolubeerera; Okuva lwe yajja munze,
Sirina kubuusabuusa kwonna munze Okuva lwe yajja munze.

Nnin(a) essuubi okub(a) omulamu nate; Okuva lwe yajja munze,
Era nnengera emiryango gye ggulu; Okuva lwe yajja munze.

Mumutende Yes(u) Omununuzi waffe!
Muyimbe ku kwagala kw(e) okungi
Mumutende bamalayika mu ggulu
Erinnya lye liweebwe ekitiibwa!
Ng'Omusu~mba, anakuum(a) abaana be
Mu mikono gye abasitule.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mumutende! Ow'ekitiibwa asinga;
Mumutende! N'ennyimb(a) ez'essanyu.

Mumutende Yes(u) Omununuzi waffe!
Olw'ebibi byaffe yajeezebwa
Ye lwe Lwazi, (e)ssuubi ery'obulokozi
Mumusuute eyakomererwa.
Yimba ku~ Ye! Yetikk(a) ennaku zaffe
Wa kwagala (o)kung(i) okwewuunyisa,

Mumutende Yes(u) Omununuzi waffe!
Ab'omuggulu mumuyimbire!
Yes(u) afuga emirembe n'emirembe
Nga Kabaka atikkirwe engule!
Kristo a~jja mubuwanguzi kunsi
Obuyinza n'ekitiibwa bibye.

Baibul(i) ebikkulirw(e) ensi! Kyekigendererwa kyaffe!
Amazima gabikkulwe, Gasaasaanye emikisa.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Kigambo kye—(Kya mukisa)
Kibunyise —(Musana gwe)
Ku lukalu ne ku nnyanja~
Abali mu kizikiza~ Kibazze eri Katonda.

Wonna Baibuli wetuuka- - Eyas(a) omusana gwayo;
Egoba ekizikiza, N'amaany(i) ag'ekibi gonna.

Erag(a) abantu Kitaffe - - Oy(o) ajjudde okwagala;
Aboonoonyi mu Adamu, Ebaw(a) essuubi mu Yesu.

Etegeeza ebya Yesu, - - Eyaf(a) atuw(e) obulamu;
Era bonn(a) abakkiriza, Baba baana ba Katonda.

Waliwo ekiwummulo – (O)kumpi ne Katonda
Ekibi wekitatuuka – (O)kumpi ne Katonda.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Yesu Omununuzi, (O)kuv(a) ewa Katonda,
Tunyweze ff(e) abalinze, (O)kumpi ne Katonda.

Waliw(o) ekif(o) ekirungi - (O)kumpi ne Katonda.
Wetusisinkana Yesu - (O)kumpi ne Katonda.

Tusumululirwa awo - (O)kumpi ne Katonda.
We wal(i) essanyu n'eddembe - (O)kumpi ne Katonda.

title: Mbe Wuwo Nzenna
first_line: Kyensaba Yesu mbeere wuwo, Nnung'amya, nnung'amya;

verses.lines:
Kyensaba Yesu mbeere wuwo, Nnung'amya, nnung'amya;
Nkole by'osiima so si byange Nkusab(a) onnyambe.

verses.label: Chorus

verses.lines:
Eby'ensi byonna bigasa ki, Wotali, wotali?
Olw'erinnya lyo ka mbireke, Ggwe byonna gyendi.

Ng'amasanyu g'ensi ngaleka, Nsembeza, nsembeza;
Bwemba w'oli mba nnina byonna, Yes(u) onsembeze.

title: Nga Ntuuse Eka
first_line: Ndyambal(a) engule ya zaabu mu ggulu;

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
([Nga ntuus(e) eka ]x2
Ennaku yange yonna, Eriggwawo.)x2

Ekizikiza kyonna kiriggwawo
Ndirab(a) ekitangala nga ntuuse eka,
(O)musana gw'e ggulu, gummulise wonna
Gunkulembere nze ntuuke eka.

Ndirab(a) amaaso ga Yesu nga ntuuse
Nnyimbe ku kisakye ekyandokola
Nnyimirire waali, Mu ssanyu mmusinze
Emirembe gyonna – nga ntuus(e) eka.

title: Abakunguzi Banaava Wa?
first_line: Abakunguzi bali ludda wa, Baggye abantu mu ns(i) ey'ekibi?

verses.lines:
Abakunguzi bali ludda wa, Baggye abantu mu ns(i) ey'ekibi?
N'ekigambo kye ekya mazima, (O)kutuus(a) omulimu nga guwedde.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Abakunguzi banaava wa? Abanaakola mu ssany(u) eringi
Abaneewayo, tukungaanye, Abantu be bave mu ns(i) embi?

Mu banoonye mu makubo gonna; Mulimu ababulidde omwo;
Munoonye wonna mu buli kifo, Muleete bonna olw'ensi empya.

Ennimiro wonna zengedde nnyo, Ensi erinze amakungula;
Naye abakozi batono nnyo, Tunafiirwa bingi bwe tulwawo.

Mujje mw(e) abantu be n'ebiwabyo, Tukungulire wam(u) abantu be;
Tugumiikiriz(e) omulimu, Tukungulire mu ssany(u) eringi.

title: Eyazaawa Azaawuse
first_line: Mukub(e) ennanga munsi ne mu ggulu,

verses.lines:
Mukub(e) ennanga munsi ne mu ggulu,
Omwan(a) eyazaawa azaawuse;
Laba Katonda nga amwaniriza,
Mu ssanyu ng'amusisinkana.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Bamalayika bayimbe nnyo
Mu kitiibw(a) ennanga zivuge
Eggye ly'abanunul(e) nga tuyimba
(O)luyimba lw'Omwana gw'Endiga.

Mukub(e) ennanga munsi ne mu ggulu,
Eyazaawa asonyiyiddwa;
Anunuliddwa mu ns(i) en(o) ey'ekibi,
Lab(a) azaaliddwa buggya nate.

Embaga etegekeddwa muyimbe!
Oluyimb(a) olw'obuwanguzi,
Tegeeza ensi yonna ewulire;
Nt(i) eyazaawa wuun(o) azaawuse.

Tulitambula naye, Mu nsi ey'omu~sana,
Ekiro gyekitayingira; Omusana bulijjo
(O)gwakir(a) abanu~nule, Kye kitiibwa ky'Omulokozi.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
(E)ngo - ye (e)njeru -x2 [Ngoy(e) enjeru x4]
Tulyambala ngoy(e) enjeru
(E)ngo - ye (e)njeru - x2 [Za kitiibwa x2 Zeyagaza x2]
Tuliyita ne Yesu, Nga twambadde e-byeru.

Tulitambula naye, Tulabe ens(i) e~nnungi,
Tulabe Kabaka w'eggulu, Tulinyumya ne Yesu.
Mbozi empome~revu, Tuyimbe ennyimb(a) ez'essanyu.

Tulitambula naye, Ku mugg(a) ogw'obu~lamu
Nga Yesu atukulembedde, Ngatunaaziddw(a) ebibi
Tutukulidde~ ddala; Tuliba babe lubeerera.

Ba malayika bayimba, N'obwengula bwanuku~la;
(A)mawulire galeetebwa –Tuli mu ggulu!

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mu ggulu, Mu ggulu; Kya ssany(u) okutuuka ffe mu ggulu;~
Mu ggulu, Mu ggulu; (E)kitiibw(a) ekitakoma, Mu ggulu.

Ku miryango gya yasipa, Ng(a) abatambuz(e) abatuu~se;
Omusana gweyongera – Tutuuse eka!

(A)malobooz(i) ag'eggonjebwa, N'akaloosa akawo~nya;
Wulir(a) ennyimb(a) ez'essanyu – Tutuuse eka!

Teri kutonyesa zziga, Teri ssanyu liggwere~ra;
Tuliyimba nnyimba zokka, – Tutuuse eka!

Yesu bwe bulungi bwayo, Kye kitangaal(a) ekiwoo~mu;
Tusuut(e) Omwana gw'Endiga – Tutuuse eka!

title: Ndimulaba Kabaka
first_line: Ndimulaba Kabaka mu ggulu, Lumu nze ndimulaba

verses.lines:
Ndimulaba Kabaka mu ggulu, Lumu nze ndimulaba
Nga ayimbirwa bamalayika Mu nsi esinga eno.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ndimulaba, Mu kitiibwa kye
Mbe bulijjo, nga ntendereza;
Eyanfiirira, ku musalaba
Ndimulaba Ka - - - baka.

Mu ns(i) ey'ennyimba, Ey'ekitiibwa, Eteri kizikiza;
Ndifugir(a) eyo, wamu ne Yesu, Eyafa ku lwange nze.

Ndimulaba n'amaaso Kabaka, Nze ndimutendereza;
Ndiyimba ku kwagal(a) okwamussa, Ekisa kye kimala.

title: Ekisa Ekyewuunyisa
first_line: (E)kisa kya Yesu kyewuunyisa, Kisinga nnyo ekibi kyaffe;

verses.lines:
(E)kisa kya Yesu kyewuunyisa, Kisinga nnyo ekibi kyaffe;
Kyalagibwa ku musaalaba, Omusaayi gwe gye gwayiika.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
E – ki – sa – kye, Kingi ddal(a) era kitukuza,
[Kyewunyisa, Tekikoma]
E – ki – sa – kye; Kisonyiya ekibi kyaffe.
[Kyewunyisa, Tekikoma]

Ekibi n'okuggwam(u) essuubi, Bitiisa nnyo emyoyo gyaffe;
Ekisa ekitagambika, Kitulaga omusalaba.

Tetuyinza kukisa bbala, Kik(i) ekiyinz(a) okulyozaawo?
Laba ensul(o) ey'omusaayi, Oyinz(a) okutukula leero.

Ekisa ekitenkanika, Kya bwereere er(i) akkiriza;
Mmwe abaagal(a) okumulaba, Mwetag(a) ekisaky(e) olwa leero?

Nikodemu ya~jja eri Yesu,
Namubuuz(a) ekkubo ly'obulokozi;
Yamuddamu, "O~kulokolebwa,
Ggwe zaalibwa buggya!"

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Muzaalibwe~ buggya x2
Ddala ddala mbagamba kino kyokka,
Mu - - - zaalibwe buggya.

Abantu mwenna~ mukiwulire,
Ekigambo Yesu kyeyayogera;
Temugaya o~bubak(a) obwo
Muzaalibwe buggya.

Bwoba onooyingi~r(a) ekiwummulo,
Oyimb(o) oluyimba lw'abanunule;
Ng'oyagala obu~lam(u) obutaggwawo
Ggwe zaalibwa buggya.

Tunula ku musalab(a) owone
Yes(u) agamba, "Ntunuulira!"
(O)bugagga bw'ensi bwo temuli
Ndab(a) obugagga mu musalaba.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Tunul(a) o – be mulamu
Tunul(a) e – Gologoosa
(O)bulokozi bwa buwa
Tunul(a) e – Gologooza.

Bwennatunuulir(a) Omulokozi,
N'alab(a) akamwenyumwenyu,
(E)bizibu bw'ebijja nga bingi;
Nfuuna amaanyi mu musalaba.

Ka ngutunuulirenga bulijjo,
Nga nneesig(a) ekisuubizo;
Nti tewali aliwangulwa,
Eyeesiga amaanyi g'eggulu.

Nnyigiriza okutuuka, Ku ntikko y'okukkiriza
Nga nsaba ng'ende mu maaso, Mukama ntuusa mu ggulu.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
(O)Nsitula onnyimirize, Mu kibug(a) eky'omuggulu;
Kyenjagala ekisinga, Mukam(a) ontuuse mu ggulu.

Seegomba kubeera wano, (O)kubuusabuusa n'okutya;
Wadd(e) abamu bali mu byo, Mukama ntuusa mu ggulu.

Njagala mbere mu ggulu, Wadde Setaan(i) anwanyisa;
Mpulidde ennyimb(a) ennungi, Ng'abo'mu ggulu bayimba.

Ndubirir(a) okutuuk(a) eyo, Mu kwakaayakan(a) okungi;
Nze kye nsaba ontuus(e) eyo, Mukama ntuusa mu ggulu.

title: Mu Mikono Gye Yesu
first_line: Mu mikono gye Ye~su, ne mu kifuba kye,

verses.lines:
Mu mikono gye Ye~su, ne mu kifuba kye,
Nfuun(a) emirembe mi~ngi, E~ra n'empummula;
Nga bamalayika be, Bayimba n'essanyu,~
Ku nnimiro n'ennyanja, ebimasamasa.~

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mu mikono gye Ye~su, Ne mu kifuba kye;
Nfun(a) emirembe mi~ngi, E~ra n'empummula.

Mu mikono gya Ye~su, Mwemponer(a) okufa;
Nebikemo by'omu~ nsi, Mbi~wonera ddala,
Ekibi tekinnyinza, N'okunakuwala;~
Okunnumya omwoyo (E)bigezo n'okutya.~

Yesu ggw(e) eyanfiri~ra, Kiddukiro kyange,
Nyweredde kuggwe Ye~su, E~ra nga nkwesiga;
Ka n'gumirenga byonna, Ekiro kiyita,~
Obudde lwebulikya, lwe tulisomoka.~

title: Ba Mukisa
first_line: Wulir(a) ebigambo bya Yesu, Bya bulamu bya mazima;

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ba mukis(a) abakwat(a) amateeka,
Ba mukisa~ Ba mukisa;
Ba mukis(a) abakwat(a) amateeka,
Ba mukisa, Nga besiimye!

Simanyi lwa~ki~ Katonda Yanjagala~ bwa~tyo,
Nz(e) omubi a~ta~sanira Nangu-la mbe~ wu~we.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nze mmany(i) oyo, Gwennakkiriza,
Era mmanyi nti afaayo gyendi,
Akuuma byeyasuubiza;
Okutuusa lwalidda.

Simanyi lwa~ki~ yampa nze (E)kis(a) ekindo~ko~la,
(O)Kukkiriz(a) e~ki~gambo kye, Kwampa emi~re~mbe.

Simanyi (O)mwo~yo~ bwakola Ng'alung'amy(a) a~ba~ntu,
Nga babikku~li~ra Yesu, Nebamukki~ri~za.

Simanyi bi~nni~ndiridde – Bib(i) oba bi~ru~ngi;
(O)luvannyuma~ lw'o~kukoowa, Ndirab(a) amaa~so~ ge.

Simayi Ye~su~ lwalidda, Kir(o) o~ba mi~sana,
Katambule na~ye wano Era ne mu~ns(i) e~mpya.

Kang'ambe Yesu, (E)bikemo byonna,
(O)Mugugu siguyinze nzekka;
Mu bizibu byange anannyamba,
Alabirira abantu be.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ka ng'ambe Yesu, Ka ng'ambe Yesu;
(O)Mugugu si guyinze nzekka
Ka ng'ambe Yesu, Ka ng'ambe Yesu
Yesu y'annyamba ~ Yesu yekka!

Kang'ambe Yesu, Emitawaana;
Mukama musaasiz(i) afaayo,
Bwe mmutegeeza anandokola,
Emitawaana, agikomye.

Ensi ensikiriza n'ebibi,
Nkemebwa mu mwoy(o) okwonoona;
Kangambe Yesu, Ddal(a) anannyamba,
Mbeere muwanguzi, w'ens(i) eno.

title: Mukama Omuyaga Mungi
first_line: Mukam(a) omuyaga mungi! Gukunta nnyo ku nnyanja!

verses.lines:
Mukam(a) omuyaga mungi! Gukunta nnyo ku nnyanja!
Ekizikiza kunsi kingi sirina kiddukiro,
Tofaayo nga tufa ffena, Lwaki gwe webase?
Twelalikiridde ennyanj(a) eno, Eyinz(a) okutumira.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Temutya mayengo na muyaga - mu - - gume!
Ennyanja nebwenesiikuka, Ba dayimon(i) oba bantu wadde kiki!
Ennyanja teyinza kusanyawo, Ekyombo Mukama ng'ali mukyo.
"Byonna nze bin fukamirira, Mugume, mugume;
Bigonder(a) eddoboozi lyange, mmwe temutya."

Mukama entiis(a) egenze n'ennyanja yonna nteefu,
Lab(a) enjuba yange etuuse, nens(i) etangadde yonna,
Mununuzi beera nange, Era tonvangako
Mu ssanyu ndituuka emitala, Mu makaago ggulu.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
(O)bwesigwa bwo bungi, x2
Buli lukya ndaba ekisa kyo;
(O)mukono gwo gumpadde byenetaaga
(O)bwesigwa bwo bungi gyendi Yesu.

(O)musana n'enkuba, n'amakungula;
Enjuba, omwezi n'emmunyeenye,
Bikuwaako byonna obujulirwa
Ku bwesigwa bwo n'okwagala kwo.

(O)mulokozi tukusinza, Tubuulir(a) e~kisa kyo;
Ggwe (O)wamaanyi (O)mutukuvu, Lya kitiibw(a) e~rinnya lyo.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Lya ~- - - - - -ki - -tiibwa x2 Lya kitiibw(a) erinnya lyo;
[Lya kitiibw(a) erinnya lyo]x2
Lya ~ - - - - -- ki - - tibwa x2 Lya kitiibw(a) erinnya lyo.
[Lya kitiibw(a) erinnya lyo]x2

(O)mununuz(i) era Mukama, (O)musan(a) ogu~takoma;
(A)batukuvu mu nsi zonna, Bayimbe ng(a) e~ttendo lyo.

Walek(a) entebe mu ggulu, N'ojja ku mu~saalaba;
N'ofa nga ssaddaaka yaffe, (A)bonoonyi tu~be babo.

Jjang(u) Omulokoz(i) atafa, Otuule ku~ ntebe yo;
Ofug(e) emirembe gyonna, Obwakaba~ka bubwo.

Yesu ye Mulokoz(i) ow'ekitalo, (O)mulokoz(i) eyewuunyisa;
Akwek(a) obulamu bwange mu lwazi, Mwendab(a) emigg(a) egy'essanyu.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Akwek(a) obulamu bwange mu Lwazi;
(E)kisiikirize mu ddungu,
Ankweka mu kwagala kwe okungi
( N'ankuuma n'omukono gwe.) x2

Yesu ye mulokoz(i) ow'ekitalo, Aggyaw(o) omugugu gwange;
Ampanirira n'esinyenyezebwa, Ampa amaanyi bulijjo.

Ampa emikisa buli kiseera, Anzijuz(a) ekitiibwa kye;
Ndiyimba nga nzuukidde mu kitiibwa, Ku Mununuz(i) omwagalwa.

Bwendyambazibwa obutukuvu bwe, Mmusisinkane ku bire;
Ndiyimba n'abanunule abangi, Ku bulokoz(i) obw'ekisa.

title: Anoonya N'ekisa
first_line: Ayita n'ekisa, abaabula; Abawabira ku busozi;

verses.lines:
Ayita n'ekisa, abaabula; Abawabira ku busozi;
"Mujje gy'endi," bwatyo bw'abayita, N'olwa leero Yesu ayita.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Gend(a)e wa la ku nso - zi zo - nna zo - nna;
Ko mya wo a ba wa ba bo nna bo nna
Mu ki si bo ky'O mu lo ko zi wa ffe
Ye su e ya fa ku lw'a bo noo nyi.

Gend(a) obanoonye, Balage Yesu; Abalwadde n'abanafuye;
Baleete eri obulokozi, Mu bulamu obutaggwaawo.

Kang'ende eri Yesu ampise, Mmugobere-re-nga bulijjo;
Nnyambe abanafu n'abagudde, Mbalage Yesu Ye ly'ekkubo.

title: Nnaagenda Gy'oyagala
first_line: Ku nsozi ennungi ennyo, Oba ku nnyanja embi ennyo,

verses.lines:
Ku nsozi ennungi ennyo, Oba ku nnyanja embi ennyo,
Oba mu ntalo ez'amaanyi, Wonna w'onjagaliza;
Bwe mpulira nga~ Ggwe ompita, Mu kkubo lye si~manyi,
Bw'ononkwata ku mukono~ gwange, Nagenda gy'oyagala.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nagenda gy'oyagala, Mukama; Ku nsozi; oba ku~ nnyanja;
Nayongeranga Ggwe by'oya~gala, Nze—Nnaabeera ky'oyagala.

Oba waliw(o) ekifo kyonna Mu nnimiro zo, Yesu,
Mw'oyagala nze nkukolere, Ggw(e) eyakomererwa;
Nga nesiga o~bukuumi bwo, Kubanga onja~gala,
Nka nkukolere nga ndi mwe~sigwa, Mbeere nga bw'oyagala.

title: Yogera Nange Yesu
first_line: Yogera nange Yesu mu ddobooz(i) eddungi,

verses.lines:
Yogera nange Yesu mu ddobooz(i) eddungi,
Mpulire ng'ong'amba nti, "Guma toli wekka."
Nnongoosa omutima mpulir(e) eddoboozi,
Nyimbeng(a) amatendo go, Nsanyukire mu Ggwe.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ontegeeze n'ekisa, Mu kisa ky(o) ondage
Nti mu Gggwe ndiwangula, Ndifuna eddembe,
Ontegeeze kakano, Mu kisa kyo (e)kingi;
Mpulire bw'ong'amba nti "Guma toli wekka"

Tegeez(a) ababo bonna Balag(e) ekkubo lyo;
Obajjuz(e) essanyu lyo Bayig(e) okusaba.
Bawengay(o) obulamu Bwabwe bonna gy'oli,
Bakol(e) omulimu gwo (O)kutuusa lw'olijja.

Mukama mbikkulira Nga banabbi (a)b'edda,
Kye nsana okukola Ntuuse (a)mateeka go;
Ka nkugulumizenga, Nate ka nnyimbenga,
Nkolenga by'oyagala, Nkutenderezenga.

Nakola ntya Yes(u) ono, (O)mulokozi wange?
Ayambadde (e)fulungu N'engule (e)y'amaggwa?

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
(E)kibuuzo kye kino, (E)ky'okuddamu kiki:
Nkomerere Yesu Kri-sto, Balabba ateebwe?

Nnaalek(a) omubb(i) agende, Omunt(u) ow'ekibi?
Oba Krist(o) Oyo Yesu, atalina kibi?

Kibuuzo nga kikulu! Kizibu nnyo ddala!
Ekisakye nga kingi, Nzenna kinkankanya!

(E)nkomerero ng'etuuse Ens(i) ery'egaan(a) etya?
(E)bigambo nti, "Twala eri, Twal(a) okomerere!"

(O)mukristayo wulira, era n'omwonoonyi,
Ekibuuz(o) eky'entiisa, onokiddam(u) otya?

verses.label: Chorus 2
verses.lines:
(E)kibuuzo kye kino, (E)ky'okuddamu kino:
Kankomerere Balabba, Yesu Krist(o) ateebwe.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
(E)bigambo byo birungi nnyo, Eby'obulokozi~;
(E)bigambo byo birungi nnyo, Eby'obulokozi.

Nkwagala, nkwagala, nkwa~gala Yesu,
Mulokozi wange, Ka~tonda wange;
Obanga nkwagala, kino (o)kimanyi!
Ebikolwa byange, bi~naakakasa.

Nsanyuka, nsanyuka, nga~ kyakitalo!
Nnengera, nnengera, e~nsi ennungi;
Njagal(a) okubeera (a)wamu ne Yesu,
Era n'okulaba ba~malayika.

Mulokozi wange, O~mpadd(e) essanyu;
(O)bulamu, kuwummula~ n'emirembe,
Kwagalakwo kungi, nnaakwebazanga,
(E)kisakyo kinsanyusa~ omutima.

Ani afaanana Ye~su Kabaka,
Gwennaayimbangako e~nnaku zonna?
Kammutenderereze, muyimbire nnyo,
Kubanga njijudde e~ssanyu lingi.

title: Mu Ssanyu N'okukwebaza
first_line: Mu ssanyu n'okumwebaza, Nyimus(a) eddoboozi lyange;

verses.lines:
Mu ssanyu n'okumwebaza, Nyimus(a) eddoboozi lyange;
Nnaayimba ntya okwagala Kwa Yesu okw'ekitalo.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Kwagala kwo, kwa kitalo, Okwagala kwo Ye-su,
Kwagala kwo, kwa kitalo, Okwagala kwo Ye-su.

Emisan(a) era n'ekiro, Mu muyaga, mu nzikiza;
Mu bulumi, mu bunafu, Nnaayimbang(a) okwagala kwo.

Bwenasabang(a) onsonyiwe, Bwenagwanga onsitule;
Mu bulamu ne mu kufa, Nnaayimbang(a) okwagala kwo.

title: Nsembeza, Nsembeza
first_line: Yesu omugabo gwange, obulamu bwange nze

verses.lines:
Yesu omugabo gwange, obulamu bwange nze
Mu lugendo lwange lwonna, ka ntambulenga naawe.

verses.label: Chorus 1
verses.lines:
Nsembeza, Nsembeza, Nsembeza, Nsembeza;
Mu lugendo lwange lwonna, ka ntambulenga naawe.

Amasanyu g'ensi eno, n'ebitiibwa saagala
Nebwenabonabonanga, kantambulenga naawe.

verses.label: Chorus 2
verses.lines:
Nsembeza, Nsembeza, Nsembeza, Nsembeza;
Nebwenabonabonanga, kantambulenga naawe.

Yesu onkulemberenga, mu muyengo gw'ensi eno,
Onzigulire oluggi, lw'obulam(u) obutaggwawo.

verses.label: Chorus 3
verses.lines:
Nsembeza, Nsembeza, Nsembeza, Nsembeza;
Onzigulire oluggi, (O)lw'obulam(u) obutaggwawo.

title: Ettabaaza Zammwe Zaake
first_line: Ttabaaza zammwe zaake nnyo, E~kiro kisembedde;

verses.lines:
Ttabaaza zammwe zaake nnyo, E~kiro kisembedde;
Eky'enzikiz(a) ekutt(e) ennyo, Ye~su nga akomawo.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Twetegek(e) ab'oluganda,
Ttabaaza zaffe zijjule;
Mu~kama waffe wuuy(o) ajja,
Tu~koleez(e) ettabaaza.

Wadde bangi tebafaayo, Ku~ bya kudda kwa Yesu;
Okudda kwe kukakafu, E~ryo ly'essuubi lyaffe.

(A)mazima g'ekigambo kye, Ye~ttabaaza gye tuli;
Ne bwetwetoloolw(a) akabi, Ye~su abeera naffe.

(O)kukkiriza n'ebikolwa, Bi~rabikenga mu ffe;
Ggwe kkiriz(a) ekigambo kye, Ye~su abeere naawe.

title: Tulina Obubaka
first_line: Tulin(a) obubak(a) er(i) amawanga, Obunakyus(a) emitima,

verses.lines:
Tulin(a) obubak(a) er(i) amawanga, Obunakyus(a) emitima,
Bwa mirembe bwa ssuubi.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Enkya ennungi ejja kunsi, Omusana gweyongere,
(O)bwakabaka bwa Yesu bujje, Obw'essanyu ne ddembe.

Tulin(a) oluyimb(a) er(i) amawanga, (O)luwangula e~kibi,
Olunagyaw(o) entalo, Olunagyaw(o) entalo,~~

Tulin(a) Obubak(a) er(i) amawanga, Nti kabak(a) ow'omuggulu,
Yatuwerez(a) o~mwana we, Atulag(e) okwagala,~~

Katulag(e) ensi Omulokozi (E)yabonaabona ku lwaffe,
Abantu bonna, (a)b'o~mu nsi, Badde er(i) amazima,~~

title: Mukama Ali Mu Yekaalu
first_line: Muka – m(a) ali mu yekaalu~ ye;

verses.lines:
Ne~wuuny(a)~ ekisa ekingi, E~kyando~kola~ nze;
Nna~li mbu~ze, ne~kinzuula, (O)mu~zibe~ ne ndaba.

E~kisa~ kyanjigiriza, (O)ku~gonde~ra Ye~su;
Na~lyoka~ ne nki~kkiriza, Bwe~ naki~wu lira.

(O)ku~tega~na n'emitego, Ki~bimpi~sizzaa~mu;
(E)ki~sa e~kyo, ki~rintuusa, Mu~maka~ ga Yesu.

Mu~kama~ ye yansuubiza, E~ra nze~ mmwesi~ga;
A~nanku~ma, A~nantaasa, Nga~ ntambu~la ku nsi.

Mu~ ggulu~ tulibeerayo, E~myaka~ luku~mi;
Tu~liyi~mba, Tu~musinze, Ye~su (e)nna~ku zonna.

title: Katonda Musumba Wange
first_line: Katonda~ Musu~mba wange, Era~ Ye andiisa:

verses.lines:
Katonda~ Musu~mba wange, Era~ Ye andiisa:
Nze ndi~ wuwe, naye~ wange; Byonn(a) e~byange bibye.

Andis(a) o~muddo~ (o)mulungi, Nziku~ta, mpummula;
Awa~l(i) emigg(a) emi~rungi, Anywe~sa lwa kisa.

Bwe nkyama~ Ye a~nkomyawo, N'ang'u~mya omwoyo;
So si~lwa bulungi~ bwange, Lwa li~nnya lye lyokka.

Mu kiwo~nvu e~ky'o kufa, Ndiyi~ta nga sitya;
Olu~gga lwe n'omu~ggo gwe, Bye bi~nankuumanga.

(O)kwagala~ kwe o~kulungi, Kunaa~banga nange;
N'oku~tendereza~ kwange, Kwo te~kulikoma.

verses.label: Chorus

verses.lines:
Waggul(u) ennyo, mu bwe~ngu~la~; E~bi~ri~yo biru~ngi~ nnyo~
(E)ggulu eritema~ga~na,~ Byo~nna~ bi~raga gye~bya~va;
Enjuba buli lunaku, Eyo~les(a) e~kitii~bwa kye,
Neraga buli nsi yonna, (E)miri~mu gy'e~mikono gye.

Akawungeezi bwe~ ka~jja,~ (O)mwe~zi~ gu~vaayo ne~ gwa~ka;~
Ensi bweyakirw(a) o~mwe~zi,~ Ki~ra~ga~ obuto~nzi~ bwe,
Emmunyeenye nga zaaka nnyo, Ng(a) ensi~ mu bba~nga ze~kyusa;
Byonna birag(a) amaanyi ge, N'ama~zima~ mu nsi yonna.

Bitambula kasi~ri~se,~ O~kwe~to~lool(a) e~nsi~ yo~nna;~
Wadde nga tebiree~kaa~na,~ Bi~mu~lisa buli~ wa~ntu;
Bw'obirowozaako byonna, Biba~ bigu~lumi~za ye,
Byaka nga bwe biyimba nti, "Eya~tuto~nda wa maanyi!"

Bwetulituuka mu ggulu netwegatta wamu, Tuliyimba ku kwagala kwa Yesu gyetuli;
Nga tuyise mu milyango giri egya zaabu, Fenna aba~nunulibwa tuliyimba wamu.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ssanyu [ssanyu], Ssanyu [ssanyu], Yesu ali~ kumpi (ddala)
Ddala atwagala (Yesu), (E)ddoboozi lye ddungi (gyendi)
Era [era], lumu [lumu] Tulisisinkana [naye]
Netuyimba ku kwagala kwe Yesu gyetuli.

Eyo tuliba mu ssanyu ery'olubeerera, Nga tutendereza Yesu olw'obuwanguzi;
Tulituuka ku mugga guli ogw'obulamu, Tewaliba~ nnaku wadde okukaaba kwonna.

Tuliraba tulimanya buli kintu kyonna, Tutambule mu nnimiro nga tulaba Yesu;
Mu kutendereza n'ennang(a) ezakolwa zaabu, Yesu ali~tikkirwa engule nga Kabaka.

Tetulizimba nnyuba netutazisulamu; Tetulisimba mmere omulala n'agirya;
Naye tulibanga wamu n'omwagalwa waffe, Nga tumweba~za olw'okutuwa obulamu.

title: Ku Lunaku Olw'emirembe
first_line: Ku lunaku (o)lw'emirembe, Ka tuyimb(e) ekitiibwa kyo

verses.lines:
(O)lunaku lulituuka ddi, Tusinze mu yekaalu yo!
Mu bwakabaka bwo Yesu, Olifuga ensi zonna,
Emirembe n'emirembe, Mu Adeni ensi empya.

"Walibaawo emikisa," Kisuubizo kya Yesu;
Walibaaw[o] okudd[a] obuggya, Okuva eri Yesu.

verses.label: Chorus

verses.lines:
"Walibaawo emikisa;" Egituzza obuggya;
Ku nsozi ne mu biwonvu, (E)mikisa mingi gijje.

"Walibaawo emikisa;" Tusaba gikke ku ffe,
Otuzz(e) obuggy(a) olwa leero, (E)kisuubizo kyo kijje.

"Walibaawo emikisa;" Singa leer(o) ogituwa!
Ka tweneny(e) ebibi byaffe, Yesu otusonyiwe!

title: Tambulira Mu Musana
first_line: Tambulira mu musana~ Yesu gwe Musana~

verses.lines:
Tambulira mu musana~ Yesu gwe Musana~
Omwoyo Omutukuvu~ Anaakusanyusa.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ta ~ mbu li ra~ Mu ~ musana ~
[Tambulira mu musana gwa Katonda] [Tambulira mu musana gwa Katonda]
Ta ~ mbu li ra~ Mu musana gwa Katonda
[Tambulira mu musana gwa Katonda]

Tambulira mu musana~ Ogw'Ekigambo kye~
[E]ttaabaza y'abavubuka ~ Abeesiga Yesu.

Tambulira mu musana~ Mu ns[i] eyenzikiza~
Omusana gwe bwe gwaka~ (E)nzikiza edduka.

Tambulira mu musana~ Katond[a] akwagala ~
Ye Mukwano gw(o) ow'oku nsi ~ Era ne mu ggulu.

title: Katumusuute Yesu
first_line: Tegeeza amawanga g'omu nsi, Tegeeza wonna

verses.lines:
Tegeeza amawanga g'omu nsi, Tegeeza wonna;
Obudde bunaatera okukya, Yesu alabike.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Kabak(a) ow'ekitiibwa; Eyattibwa ku lwaffe,
Tegeeza buli muntu, Ajj(a) okufuga.

(A)mawanga mangi gali mu ntalo, Entiisa nnyingi;
(O)bubonero buli wantu wonna, Bulang(a) okudda kwe.

Abaana be muyimbe n'essanyu, N'okujaguza;
Ba mukisa abo abalinda, Okudda kwa Yesu.

Yit[a] abalwanyi, Lab[a] omulabe!
Lag[a] ebbendera ya Ye~su;
Mwesibe byonna, munywere mwenna,
Mulwanirir[e] Ekigambo kye.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mu - zuu - ku - ke, Mukungaane mwenna,
Mwetegeke n'Ekigambo kye;
Mu - ge - nde Nga mwogera "Ozaana!"
Kristo ye Muduumizi waffe.

Katonda waffe, otuwulire,
Otuyambe n'e kisa~ kyo,
[O]llutalo luggwe nga tuwangudde,
Twambazibw[e] engule mu ggulu!

title: Omusalaba Lye Kkubo
first_line: (O)musalaba kkub(o) erintwala eka, Tewali kkubo ddala

verses.lines:
(O)musalaba kkub(o) erintwala eka, Tewali kkubo ddala;
Siyinza nze kutuuka mu ggulu, Bwensubwa omusalaba.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
(O)mu~salaba lye kkubo (lye kkubo),
E~ritutuusa eka (eka);
Kinsanyusa nga ntambula ng'enda,
(O)musalaba lye kkubo.

Lye kkubo omuli omusaayi gwe, Mukama mweyayita;
Singa mpit(a) omwo ntuuka mu ggulu, Mberenga wamu ne Yesu.

Ekkubo ly'e nsi leero nze ndikyaye, Sitambulire mu lyo;
Yesu ampita tugende eka, Annindiridde ku luggi.

title: Ye Yanzigya Mu Ttosi
first_line: (O)mutima gwange gwajjula ennaku, (E)kibi nga kinsudde wala mu bunnya

verses.lines:
(O)mutima gwange gwajjula ennaku, (E)kibi nga kinsudde wala mu bunnya;
Nga ndi mu ttosi nnakowoola Yesu, Eyanzigyayo n'amp(a) essanyu lingi.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Yanzigya mu bitosi wansi, N'anteeka ku Lwazi Ye Yesu ~;
Antaddem(u) oluyimba nnyimbe, Ka nnyimbe nnyo, Aleru - ya!

Yanteeka ku Lwaz(i) olugumu ennyo, Kwennyimiridde era siivengako;
Nga ndi ku Yesu sirina kya kutya, Mu kisa kye nnindirira engule.

Ye y'amp(a) oluyimb(a) olupya nnyimbenga, (E)misana n'ekiro mmutendereze;
(O)mutima gwange gujjudd(e) emirembe, Ka ntendereze Yes(u) eyannunula.

Ka nnyimbe mmutende olw'ekisa kye, (A)bantu bonna balab(e) obulungi bwe,
Ka nnyimbe ku bulokozi bwe wonna, Abantu bonna badde eri Yesu.
